final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IoT Core to SQS data pipeline via SNS'

Parameters:
  QueueFifo:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['true', 'false']
    Default: 'false'
    Description: 'Whether to create FIFO queues'
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Custom KMS key ID/ARN/alias for SQS SSE (leave empty to use stack CMK)'
  SnsKmsKey:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Custom KMS key ID/ARN/alias for SNS SSE (leave empty to use stack CMK)'
  MqttTopicFilter:
    Type: String
    Default: 'device/data'
    Description: 'MQTT topic filter for IoT Rule'

Conditions:
  IsFifo: !Equals [!Ref QueueFifo, 'true']
  UseCustomSqsKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SqsKmsKey, '']]
  UseCustomSnsKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SnsKmsKey, '']]

Resources:
  IoTDataErrorsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/iot/${AWS::StackName}-DeviceDataErrors'
      RetentionInDays: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SqsCmk:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} SQS SSE'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SqsCmkAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-sqs-cmk'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SqsCmk

  SnsCmk:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'CMK for ${AWS::StackName} SNS SSE'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SnsCmkAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-sns-cmk'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SnsCmk

  IoTLogsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTLogsRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: IoTLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/iot/${AWS::StackName}-DeviceDataErrors:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !If
        - IsFifo
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataDLQ.fifo'
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataDLQ'
      FifoQueue: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      ContentBasedDeduplication: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseCustomSqsKey, !Ref SqsKmsKey, !Ref SqsCmk]
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !If
        - IsFifo
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataQueue.fifo'
        - !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataQueue'
      FifoQueue: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      ContentBasedDeduplication: !If [IsFifo, true, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseCustomSqsKey, !Ref SqsKmsKey, !Ref SqsCmk]
      RedrivePolicy:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '{"deadLetterTargetArn": "${DLQArn}", "maxReceiveCount": 3}'
          - DLQArn: !GetAtt IoTDataDLQ.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    DeletionPolicy: Retain

  IoTDataTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataTopic'
      DisplayName: 'IoT Data Pipeline Topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseCustomSnsKey, !Ref SnsKmsKey, !Ref SnsCmk]
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  IoTDataSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt IoTDataQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '{"deadLetterTargetArn": "${DLQArn}"}'
          - DLQArn: !GetAtt IoTDataDLQ.Arn

  IoTRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRuleRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSPublishPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref IoTDataTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DeviceDataRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}DeviceDataRule'
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: !Sub 'SELECT * FROM ''${MqttTopicFilter}'''
        Description: 'Capture messages from device/data topic and route to SNS'
        Actions:
          - Sns:
              TargetArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
        ErrorAction:
          CloudwatchLogs:
            LogGroupName: !Ref IoTDataErrorsLogGroup
            RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTLogsRole.Arn
        AwsIotSqlVersion: '2016-03-23'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS queue for IoT data'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataQueue
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataTopic
  IoTRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IoT Topic Rule'
    Value: !Ref DeviceDataRule
  IoTRuleRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role for IoT Rule'
    Value: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
  DLQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS DLQ'
    Value: !Ref IoTDataDLQ
  SqsCmkArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS CMK'
    Value: !Ref SqsCmk
  SnsCmkArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS CMK'
    Value: !Ref SnsCmk

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an S3 bucket configured to send Object Created events to Amazon EventBridge (default bus), an EventBridge rule that matches those events and forwards to an SNS topic for subscribers.'

Resources:
  BucketEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  TopicEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  NotificationBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'notification-${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true

  SecureBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref NotificationBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub '${NotificationBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ObjectCreatedTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-object-created-topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref TopicEncryptionKey
      DisplayName: S3 Object Created Notifications

  EventBridgeSNSTargetRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNSTopic
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic

  ObjectCreatedRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: 'Rule to forward S3 Object Created events from NotificationBucket to SNS topic.'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created'
        detail:
          bucket:
            name:
              - !Ref NotificationBucket
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeSNSTargetRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'bucket-name': '$.detail.bucket.name'
              'object-key': '$.detail.object.key'
              'version-id': '$.detail.versionId'
            InputTemplate: |
              {
                "source": "aws.s3",
                "event": "Object Created",
                "bucket": "<bucket-name>",
                "key": "<object-key>",
                "version": "<version-id>"
              }

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt NotificationBucket.Arn
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedRule
  BucketName:
    Description: Generated name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Sub 'notification-${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
  TopicName:
    Description: Generated name of the SNS topic
    Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-object-created-topic'
  BucketEncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
    Value: !Ref BucketEncryptionKey
  TopicEncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key for SNS topic encryption
    Value: !Ref TopicEncryptionKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Automated monitoring for Secrets Manager create/update/access events with SNS notifications

Parameters:
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
    Description: Name of the SNS topic
  EventNames:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: CreateSecret,UpdateSecret,PutSecretValue,GetSecretValue
    Description: List of Secrets Manager event names to monitor
  Enabled:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedPattern: "^(true|false)$"
    Description: Whether to enable the EventBridge rule (true or false)

Conditions:
  RuleEnabled: !Equals [!Ref Enabled, "true"]

Resources:
  SNSTopicKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS topic encryption - Secrets Manager alerts
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowKeyAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SecretsAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName
      DisplayName: Alerts for Secrets Manager Lifecycle Events
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSTopicKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeToSNSPublishRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PublishToSNSTopicPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsAlertsTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SecretsLifecycleRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: SecretsManagerLifecycleEventsRule
      Description: Captures Secrets Manager lifecycle events (create, update, access) via CloudTrail and notifies via SNS
      State: !If [RuleEnabled, ENABLED, DISABLED]
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventName: !Ref EventNames
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsAlertsTopic
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'eventName': '$.detail.eventName'
              'secretId': '$.detail.requestParameters.secretId'
              'userArn': '$.detail.userIdentity.arn'
              'sourceIP': '$.detail.sourceIPAddress'

              {

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure parameter storage and retrieval for serverless apps using SSM Parameter Store and Secrets Manager.'

Parameters:
  NamespacePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: '/demo-stack'
    AllowedPattern: '^/[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$'
    Description: 'Stack-specific namespace prefix for SSM parameters (e.g., /mystack).'

Resources:
  ConfigValueParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Value: 'This is A/B'
      Name: !Sub '${NamespacePrefix}/config/value'
      Description: 'Non-sensitive config demo'

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"adminuser"}'
        PasswordLength: 20
        ExcludeCharacters: '"!@#$%^&*()+=[]{}|;:,.<>?`"'
        IncludeSpace: false
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
      Description: 'Demo secret with predefined username and auto-generated secure password'

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref AWS::StackName
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'

  LambdaSSMAndSecretsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: LambdaSSMAndSecretsPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - ssm:GetParametersByPath
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'ssm:resource-path': !Sub '${NamespacePrefix}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - ssm:GetParameter
              - ssm:DescribeParameters
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/${NamespacePrefix}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
              - secretsmanager:DescribeSecret
            Resource: !Ref AppSecret
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'secretsmanager.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  ParameterRetrievalFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DependsOn: ConfigValueParam
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              ssm = boto3.client('ssm')
              namespace_prefix = os.environ['NamespacePrefix']
              response = ssm.get_parameters_by_path(
                  Path=namespace_prefix + '/config/',
                  Recursive=True,
                  WithDecryption=False
              )
              secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
              secret_id = os.environ['SECRET_ARN']
              secret = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_id)
              print(json.dumps({
                  'ssm_params': response,
                  'secret': secret
              }))
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          NamespacePrefix: !Ref NamespacePrefix
          SECRET_ARN: !Ref AppSecret

Outputs:
  SSMParamName:
    Description: 'Name of the SSM Parameter'
    Value: !Ref ConfigValueParam
  SecretArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Secrets Manager Secret'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}'
  LambdaArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda Function'
    Value: !GetAtt ParameterRetrievalFunction.Arn
  RoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda Execution Role'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Sample Lambda Function with IAM Role'

Parameters:
  FunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: sample-lambda
  Runtime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.12
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  NoS3Access: !Equals [!Ref S3BucketName, '']

Resources:
  SampleLambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SampleLambdaExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
                - edgelambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        Fn::If:
          - NoS3Access
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
          -
            - PolicyName: SampleLambdaInlinePolicy
              PolicyDocument:
                Version: '2012-10-17'
                Statement:
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - s3:GetObject
                    Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3BucketName}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

  SampleLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref FunctionName
      Runtime: !Ref Runtime
      Role: !GetAtt SampleLambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': 'Hello from Lambda!'
              }
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      RuntimeManagementConfig:
        UpdateRuntimeOn: Auto
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: LambdaSample

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: The name of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !Ref SampleLambdaFunction
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: The ARN of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn
  LambdaInvokeArn:
    Description: The Invoke ARN of the sample Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt SampleLambdaFunction.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: |-
  Creates two IAM roles and instance profiles for EC2 instances with read-only access to IAM metadata.
  Each role trusts the EC2 service and attaches the IAMReadOnlyAccess managed policy for iam:Get* and iam:List* permissions.

Resources:
  EC2IamReadOnlyRoleOne:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access

  EC2IamReadOnlyProfileOne:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IamReadOnlyRoleOne

  EC2IamReadOnlyRoleTwo:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: "/"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/IAMReadOnlyAccess
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-IAM-ReadOnly-Access

  EC2IamReadOnlyProfileTwo:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2IamReadOnlyRoleTwo

Outputs:
  EC2IamReadOnlyRoleOneArn:
    Description: ARN of the first EC2 IAM ReadOnly Role
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadOnlyRoleOne.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadOnlyRoleOne-Arn'

  EC2IamReadOnlyProfileOneArn:
    Description: ARN of the first EC2 IAM ReadOnly Instance Profile
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadOnlyProfileOne.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadOnlyProfileOne-Arn'

  EC2IamReadOnlyRoleTwoArn:
    Description: ARN of the second EC2 IAM ReadOnly Role
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadOnlyRoleTwo.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadOnlyRoleTwo-Arn'

  EC2IamReadOnlyProfileTwoArn:
    Description: ARN of the second EC2 IAM ReadOnly Instance Profile
    Value: !GetAtt EC2IamReadOnlyProfileTwo.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2IamReadOnlyProfileTwo-Arn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Deploys an isolated MySQL RDS instance (db.r5.large with io1 storage) in a dedicated VPC with two private subnets across Availability Zones for network isolation.

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydatabase
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
  Iops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3000
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  Subnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  Subnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet1Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1"

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet2Cidr
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2"

  RouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  RouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Private subnets for RDS isolation
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DBSubnetGroup"

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL access from VPC CIDR
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSSecurityGroup"

  MonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MonitoringRole"

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:/rds/mysql/master-password:1}}'
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MySQL"
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DeletionProtection: true
      MultiAZ: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: 03:00-04:00
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt MonitoringRole.Arn
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MySQL"

Outputs:
  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS MySQL Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSEndpointAddress"

  RDSEndpointPort:
    Description: RDS MySQL Instance Endpoint Port
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Port
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RDSEndpointPort"

  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID for the isolated RDS deployment
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with automated snapshots and basic public networking infrastructure across two AZs.'

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydatabase'
    Description: 'The name of the initial database to create.'
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
    Description: 'The master username for the RDS instance.'
  DBInstanceIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: 'mydb-instance'
    Description: 'The identifier for the RDS DB instance.'
  BackupRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    Description: 'The number of days to retain automated backups.'
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 35

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2'

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} DB Subnet Group'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup'

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for RDS MySQL instance allowing inbound 3306 from anywhere.'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg'

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.small
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret:
        KmsKeyId: alias/aws/rds
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Ref DBInstanceIdentifier
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionPeriod
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:04:00-sun:05:00'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MultiAZ: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: true

Outputs:
  RdsEndpointAddress:
    Description: 'Endpoint address of the RDS MySQL instance.'
    Value: !GetAtt DBInstance.Endpoint.Address

  VPCId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC.'
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: 'ID of Public Subnet 1.'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: 'ID of Public Subnet 2.'
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: 'ID of the Public Route Table.'
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure MySQL RDS in isolated VPC with Secrets Manager

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-a"

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-b"

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"

  PrivateRouteTableAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

  PrivateRouteTableAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: !Sub "${AWS::StackName} DB Subnet Group"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup"

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Custom MySQL 8.0 parameter group
      Family: mysql8.0

  RdsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow MySQL access from VPC CIDR
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
          FromPort: 3306
          IpProtocol: tcp
          ToPort: 3306
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-sg"

  RdsMonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-monitoring-role"

  RdsAdminSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Description: RDS MySQL admin credentials
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-admin-${AWS::Region}"

  SecretsEndpointSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Secrets Manager VPC endpoint
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
          FromPort: 443
          IpProtocol: tcp
          ToPort: 443
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secrets-endpoint-sg"

  SecretsManagerEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Action: secretsmanager:*
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Resource: '*'
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecretsEndpointSG
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.secretsmanager'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-secretsmanager-endpoint"

  RDS:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DependsOn:
      - PrivateRouteTableAssociationA
      - PrivateRouteTableAssociationB
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.small
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql"
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      DeletionProtection: true
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref RdsAdminSecret
      MonitoringInterval: 60
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt RdsMonitoringRole.Arn
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      StorageType: gp2
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RdsSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql"

Outputs:
  RdsEndpointAddress:
    Description: RDS Instance Endpoint Address
    Value: !GetAtt RDS.Endpoint.Address
  RdsAdminSecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Admin Secret
    Value: !Ref RdsAdminSecret
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PrivateSubnetAId:
    Description: Private Subnet A ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
  PrivateSubnetBId:
    Description: Private Subnet B ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure S3 buckets with SSE, blocked public access, HTTPS-only policy, and access logging.'

Resources:
  ReplicasBucketKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for ReplicasBucket SSE-KMS'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-accesslogs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'AllowS3Logging'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'logging.s3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/logs/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: 'DenyInsecureTransport'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ReplicasBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-replicas-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ReplicasBucketKey
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: 'logs/'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  ReplicasBucketPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy'
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicasBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'DenyInsecureTransport'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !Sub '${ReplicasBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
  AccessLogsBucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Access Logs Bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
  ReplicasBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the Replicas Bucket'
    Value: !Ref ReplicasBucket
  ReplicasBucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Replicas Bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicasBucket.Arn
  ReplicasBucketKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of KMS key for ReplicasBucket encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicasBucketKey.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 Bucket with Lambda trigger for object events'

Parameters:
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: python3.13
    Description: 'Runtime for the Lambda function'
    AllowedValues:
      - python3.13

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-lambda-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  S3TriggerLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-s3-trigger-lambda'
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.parse

          def handler(event, context):
              print('Received event: ' + json.dumps(event, indent=2))
              for record in event['Records']:
                  bucket = record['s3']['bucket']['name']
                  key = urllib.parse.unquote_plus(record['s3']['object']['key'], encoding='utf-8')
                  print(f"Processing file from bucket: {bucket}, key: {key}")
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Hello from Lambda!')
              }
      Timeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  TriggerBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-trigger-bucket'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Function: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
            Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Filter:
              S3Key:
                Rules:
                  - Name: prefix
                    Value: uploads/
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: S3LambdaTrigger
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  TriggerBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref TriggerBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Ref TriggerBucket
              - !Sub '${TriggerBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLambdaAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !Ref TriggerBucket
              - !Sub '${TriggerBucket}/*'

  S3InvokeLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref S3TriggerLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      SourceArn: !GetAtt TriggerBucket.Arn

Outputs:
  TriggerBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref TriggerBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  TriggerBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt TriggerBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  S3TriggerLambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt S3TriggerLambda.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an Amazon ECR repository configured for Kubernetes container image management with root user permissions.'

Parameters:
  RepositoryName:
    Type: String
    Default: kubernetesimagerepo

Resources:
  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Ref RepositoryName
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        EncryptionType: AES256
      RepositoryPolicyText:
        Fn::Sub:
        - |
          {
            "Version": "2012-10-17",
            "Statement": [
              {
                "Sid": "RootFullAccess",
                "Effect": "Allow",
                "Principal": {
                  "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
                },
                "Action": ["ecr:*"],
                "Condition": {
                  "Bool": {
                    "aws:SecureTransport": "true"
                  }
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        - {}
      Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Ref RepositoryName
      - Key: Purpose
        Value: KubernetesContainerImages

Outputs:
  RepositoryUri:
    Description: 'Repository URI for Kubernetes image pull secret configuration.'
    Value: !GetAtt ECRRepository.RepositoryUri
  RepositoryArn:
    Description: 'Repository ARN for integration with IAM roles or Kubernetes service accounts.'
    Value: !Ref ECRRepository

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a secure SQS Standard Queue with encryption and best-practice configurations.'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Description: Deployment environment.
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout for messages in seconds.

Resources:
  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} SQS queue encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS SSE'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sqs-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
  StandardQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Standard Queue
    Value: !Ref StandardQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Standard Queue
    Value: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Multi-AZ VPC with a pair of public subnets and one private subnet across two Availability Zones using static AZ mapping for consistent deployments."

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRT"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref "AWS::Region", RegionMap, "AZ1"]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetA"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref "AWS::Region", RegionMap, "AZ2"]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetB"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.10.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [!Ref "AWS::Region", RegionMap, "AZ1"]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Public Subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnetA, !Ref PublicSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, KMS key alias, and organizational tags.

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: my-encrypted-bucket
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name to ensure global uniqueness.
  KeyAliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/my-s3-key
    Description: Name of the KMS key alias.
  TransitionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Days after which noncurrent versions transition to STANDARD_IA.
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: Days after which current versions expire.
  EnvironmentTag:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag value for the bucket and KMS key.
  OwnerTag:
    Type: String
    Default: DataTeam
    Description: Owner tag value for the bucket and KMS key.

Resources:
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to encrypt and decrypt objects
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTag
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref KeyAliasName
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  EncryptedBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DefaultLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionDays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTag
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref EncryptedBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: RequireSSEKMS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub '${EncryptedBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': aws:kms
          - Sid: RequireCorrectKMSEncryptionKey
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub '${EncryptedBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id': !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureCommunications
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt EncryptedBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${EncryptedBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref EncryptedBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt EncryptedBucket.Arn
  KmsKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref EncryptionKey
  KmsKeyAlias:
    Description: Name of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Ref KeyAlias

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'VPC with Managed NAT Gateways for HA outbound internet from private subnets'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGateway'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Prod
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Public Subnet IDs (comma delimited)
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Private Subnet IDs (comma delimited)
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]

  NatGatewayIds:
    Description: NAT Gateway IDs (comma delimited)
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref NATGateway1, !Ref NATGateway2]]

  RouteTableIds:
    Description: Route Table IDs (Public, Private1, Private2 comma delimited)
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicRouteTable, !Ref PrivateRouteTable1, !Ref PrivateRouteTable2]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream with server-side encryption using AWS managed KMS keys and destination error logging to CloudWatch Logs.

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: firehose-delivery
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name.
  LogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/kinesis/firehose/errors
    Description: Name for the CloudWatch Log Group.
  LogStreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: delivery-errors
    Description: Name for the CloudWatch Log Stream.
  BufferingIntervalInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    Description: Buffering interval in seconds for the Firehose delivery stream (60-900).
  BufferingSizeInMBs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Buffering size in MBs for the Firehose delivery stream (1-128).

Resources:
  FirehoseS3KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for Firehose S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow Firehose Role
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/FirehoseServiceRole"
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${S3BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FirehoseS3KmsKey

  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroupName
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: FirehoseErrorLogs

  LogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Ref LogStreamName

  FirehoseServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FirehoseServiceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: FirehoseS3Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject*
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetObject*
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion*
                  - s3:DeleteObject*
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt FirehoseS3KmsKey.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroupName}:*"

  DeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    DependsOn:
      - S3Bucket
      - FirehoseServiceRole
      - LogGroup
      - LogStream
    Properties:
      DirectPutSourceConfiguration: {}
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseServiceRole.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref BufferingIntervalInSeconds
          SizeInMBs: !Ref BufferingSizeInMBs
        ErrorOutputPrefix: error/
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref LogStream

Outputs:
  DeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !GetAtt DeliveryStream.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used as delivery destination
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  LogGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Group for error logging
    Value: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn
  LogStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch Log Stream for error logging
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:${LogGroupName}:log-stream:${LogStreamName}"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS Glue ETL job infrastructure: S3 bucket for scripts and logs, IAM role with necessary permissions, and Glue ETL job using runtime version 4.0 with Python script.'

Resources:
  GlueBucketKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for Glue S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow Glue service'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'glue.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      KeyUsage: 'ENCRYPT_DECRYPT'
      KeySpec: 'SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'GlueETLInfrastructure'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  GlueBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-glue-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: 'aws:kms'
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref 'GlueBucketKey'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: 'Enabled'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'GlueETLInfrastructure'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  GlueJobRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'GlueJobRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'glue.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'S3AccessPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${GlueBucket}'
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:DeleteObject'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${GlueBucket}/*'
              - Effect: 'Allow'
                Action:
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
                Resource: !GetAtt 'GlueBucketKey.Arn'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: 'GlueETLInfrastructure'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: 'Production'

  SampleConvertJob:
    Type: 'AWS::Glue::Job'
    Properties:
      Name: 'SampleConvertJob'
      GlueVersion: '4.0'
      Command:
        Name: 'glueetl'
        ScriptLocation: !Sub 's3://${GlueBucket}/gue_scripts/sample_convert.py'
        PythonVersion: '3'
      Role: !GetAtt 'GlueJobRole.Arn'
      WorkerType: 'G.1X'
      NumberOfWorkers: 2
      Timeout: 2880
      DefaultArguments:
        '--enable-continuous-cloudwatch-log': ''
        '--log-uri': !Sub 's3://${GlueBucket}/spark-logs/'
        '--enable-metrics': ''
        '--enable-job-insights': ''
      MaxRetries: 0
      Tags:
        Project: GlueETLInfrastructure
        Environment: Production

Outputs:
  GlueJobName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue ETL Job'
    Value: !Ref 'SampleConvertJob'
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Glue scripts and logs'
    Value: !Ref 'GlueBucket'
