AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Simple ECS Fargate Cluster

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-vpc
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2
        - Key: Type
          Value: Public
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ECSTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskExecutionRole
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ECSTaskRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-ECSTaskRole
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  FargateTaskSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow all outbound for Fargate tasks
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  FargateCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-FargateCluster
      CapacityProviders:
        - FARGATE
      DefaultCapacityProviderStrategy:
        - CapacityProvider: FARGATE
          Weight: 1
      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled

Outputs:
  ClusterName:
    Value: !Ref FargateCluster
  ClusterArn:
    Value: !GetAtt FargateCluster.Arn
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2]]
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
  TaskExecutionRoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref FargateTaskSecurityGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-region application failover architecture using Amazon Route 53 Application Recovery Controller (ARC). Configures a recovery cluster, control panel, routing controls for two regions, a safety rule to ensure at least one region is active, and regional health checks linked via tags.'
Parameters:
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: ARCCluster
    Description: Name of the ARC Cluster
  ControlPanelName:
    Type: String
    Default: ARCControlPanel
    Description: Name of the ARC Control Panel
  PrimaryRoutingControlName:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1-RoutingControl
    Description: Exact name for primary routing control (e.g., us-east-1-RoutingControl)
  SecondaryRoutingControlName:
    Type: String
    Default: us-west-2-RoutingControl
    Description: Exact name for secondary routing control (e.g., us-west-2-RoutingControl)
  PrimaryFQDN:
    Type: String
    Default: primary.example.com
    Description: Fully qualified domain name for primary region health check
  SecondaryFQDN:
    Type: String
    Default: secondary.example.com
    Description: Fully qualified domain name for secondary region health check
  HealthCheckPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    Description: Port for HTTP health checks
  HealthCheckPath:
    Type: String
    Default: /health
    Description: Path for HTTP health checks
Resources:
  RecoveryCluster:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::Cluster
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ClusterName
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MultiRegionFailover
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  RecoveryControlPanel:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::ControlPanel
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt RecoveryCluster.ClusterArn
      Name: !Ref ControlPanelName
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MultiRegionFailover
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  PrimaryRoutingControl:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt RecoveryCluster.ClusterArn
      Name: !Ref PrimaryRoutingControlName
  SecondaryRoutingControl:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::RoutingControl
    Properties:
      ClusterArn: !GetAtt RecoveryCluster.ClusterArn
      Name: !Ref SecondaryRoutingControlName
  AtLeastOneActiveRule:
    Type: AWS::Route53RecoveryControl::SafetyRule
    DependsOn:
      - PrimaryRoutingControl
      - SecondaryRoutingControl
    Properties:
      Name: AtLeastOneRegionActive
      ControlPanelArn: !GetAtt RecoveryControlPanel.ControlPanelArn
      RuleConfig:
        Inverted: false
        Threshold: 1
        Type: ATLEAST
      AssertionRule:
        AssertedControls:
          - us-east-1-RoutingControl
          - us-west-2-RoutingControl
        WaitPeriodMs: 0
  PrimaryHealthCheck:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HealthCheck
    Properties:
      HealthCheckConfig:
        Type: HTTP
        Port: !Ref HealthCheckPort
        ResourcePath: !Ref HealthCheckPath
        FullyQualifiedDomainName: !Ref PrimaryFQDN
        RequestInterval: 30
        FailureThreshold: 3
        Regions:
          - us-east-1
          - us-west-2
          - us-west-1
  SecondaryHealthCheck:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HealthCheck
    Properties:
      HealthCheckConfig:
        Type: HTTP
        Port: !Ref HealthCheckPort
        ResourcePath: !Ref HealthCheckPath
        FullyQualifiedDomainName: !Ref SecondaryFQDN
        RequestInterval: 30
        FailureThreshold: 3
        Regions:
          - us-east-1
          - us-west-2
          - us-west-1
Outputs:
  ClusterArn:
    Description: ARN of the Recovery Cluster
    Value: !GetAtt RecoveryCluster.ClusterArn
  ControlPanelArn:
    Description: ARN of the Control Panel
    Value: !GetAtt RecoveryControlPanel.ControlPanelArn
  PrimaryRoutingControlArn:
    Description: ARN of the Primary Region Routing Control for integration with Route 53 failover policies and automation
    Value: !GetAtt PrimaryRoutingControl.RoutingControlArn
  SecondaryRoutingControlArn:
    Description: ARN of the Secondary Region Routing Control for integration with Route 53 failover policies and automation
    Value: !GetAtt SecondaryRoutingControl.RoutingControlArn
  PrimaryHealthCheckId:
    Description: ID of the Primary Health Check linked to PrimaryRoutingControl for regional health monitoring
    Value: !Ref PrimaryHealthCheck
  SecondaryHealthCheckId:
    Description: ID of the Secondary Health Check linked to SecondaryRoutingControl for regional health monitoring
    Value: !Ref SecondaryHealthCheck

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EMR Serverless Spark application environment with private S3 bucket, IAM service role, and auto-start/auto-stop configuration for cost optimization.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: emr-serverless
    Description: Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name.
  ApplicationName:
    Type: String
    Default: SparkApp
    Description: Name for the EMR Serverless application.
  IdleTimeoutMinutes:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 60
    Description: Idle timeout in minutes before auto-stopping the application.

Resources:
  EMRBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EMRServerless

  EMRServerlessServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EMRServerlessServiceRole
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: emr-serverless.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AndCloudWatchLogsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${EMRBucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${EMRBucket}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:DescribeLogStreams
                  - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/emr-serverless/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EMRServerless

  EMRSparkApplication:
    Type: AWS::EMRServerless::Application
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApplicationName
      ReleaseLabel: emr-6.15.0
      Type: SPARK
      AutoStartConfiguration:
        Enabled: true
      AutoStopConfiguration:
        Enabled: true
        IdleTimeoutMinutes: !Ref IdleTimeoutMinutes
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EMRServerless

Outputs:
  ApplicationArn:
    Description: ARN of the EMR Serverless Spark application
    Value: !GetAtt EMRSparkApplication.Arn
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the private S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref EMRBucket
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EMR Serverless service role
    Value: !GetAtt EMRServerlessServiceRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template to create a centralized Amazon SNS topic with server-side encryption,
  secure cross-service Topic Policy, and email Subscription for aggregating alerts and events
  from AWS services into a single secure notification channel.

Parameters:
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: CentralNotificationsTopic
    Description: Name of the centralized SNS topic
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 256
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin@example.com'
    Description: Email address to subscribe for notifications (requires manual confirmation)
    AllowedPattern: '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'
    MinLength: 5
    MaxLength: 320

Resources:
  CentralSNSTopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for centralized SNS topic server-side encryption"
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${TopicName}"
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "Aggregate AWS service alerts and events"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowSNSEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
            Resource: '*'

  CentralSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${TopicName}"
      DisplayName: "Centralized Alerts and Events"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref CentralSNSTopicKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${TopicName}"
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "Aggregate AWS service alerts and events"

  CentralSNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromServices
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ["monitoring.amazonaws.com", "events.amazonaws.com", "lambda.amazonaws.com", "ec2.amazonaws.com"]
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowAccountActions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:Unsubscribe
            Resource: !Ref CentralSNSTopic

  CentralEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
      FilterPolicy: {}
      RawMessageDelivery: false

Outputs:
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the centralized SNS topic for alerts
    Value: !Ref CentralSNSTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicArn'
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the email subscription (pending confirmation)
    Value: !Ref CentralEmailSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubscriptionArn'
  EmailEndpoint:
    Description: Email endpoint of the subscription
    Value: !Ref EmailAddress

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a secure Cognito User Pool with admin-only user creation and email verification.'

Parameters:
  AllowedCallbackURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://example.com/callback'
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of allowed callback URLs for the app client.'
  AllowedLogoutURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'https://example.com/logout'
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of allowed logout URLs for the app client.'

Resources:
  SecureUserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Sub 'SecureAppUserPool-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 12
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
        - phone_number
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          EmailMessage: 'Hello {username}, your temporary password is {####}. Please log in to the Secure App, verify your email, and change your password.'
          EmailSubject: 'Invitation to Secure App'
      Schema:
        -
          Name: email
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: true
        -
          Name: name
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
        -
          Name: phone_number
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
      MfaConfiguration: 'ON'
      SmsConfiguration:
        SnsRegion: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      VerificationMessageTemplate:
        DefaultEmailOption: 'LEGACY'
        EmailMessage: 'Your verification code is {####}.'
        EmailSubject: 'Verify your email'

  SecureAppClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref 'SecureUserPool'
      ClientName: 'SecureAppClient'
      GenerateSecret: true
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - 'ADMIN_NO_SRP_AUTH'
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      CallbackURLs: !Ref 'AllowedCallbackURLs'
      LogoutURLs: !Ref 'AllowedLogoutURLs'
      RefreshTokenValidity: 30

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: 'Cognito User Pool ID'
    Value: !Ref 'SecureUserPool'
  UserPoolArn:
    Description: 'Cognito User Pool ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt 'SecureUserPool.Arn'
  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: 'Cognito User Pool Client ID'
    Value: !Ref 'SecureAppClient'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic ECS Cluster with configurable monitoring for containerized workloads.'

Parameters:
  ClusterName:
    Type: String
    Default: BasicECSCluster
  EnableContainerInsights:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - enabled
      - disabled
    Default: enabled
  CpuUtilizationThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 100
  MemoryUtilizationThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 100
  AlarmActionsArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  EnableContainerInsightsEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableContainerInsights, enabled]
  HasAlarmActions: !Not [!Equals [!Ref AlarmActionsArn, '']]

Resources:
  ECSCluster:
    Type: AWS::ECS::Cluster
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref ClusterName
      ClusterSettings:
        Fn::If:
          - EnableContainerInsightsEnabled
          - - Name: containerInsights
              Value: enabled
          - []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref ClusterName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ClusterCPUHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${ClusterName}-CPU-High'
      MetricName: ClusterCpuUtilization
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ClusterName
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref CpuUtilizationThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        Fn::If:
          - HasAlarmActions
          - [!Ref AlarmActionsArn]
          - []

  ClusterMemoryHighAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${ClusterName}-Memory-High'
      MetricName: ClusterMemoryUtilization
      Namespace: AWS/ECS
      Dimensions:
        - Name: ClusterName
          Value: !Ref ClusterName
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref MemoryUtilizationThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        Fn::If:
          - HasAlarmActions
          - [!Ref AlarmActionsArn]
          - []

Outputs:
  ECSClusterArn:
    Description: ARN of the ECS Cluster
    Value: !Ref ECSCluster
  ECSClusterName:
    Description: Name of the ECS Cluster
    Value: !Ref ClusterName
  ContainerInsightsEnabled:
    Description: Status of Container Insights
    Value: !If [EnableContainerInsightsEnabled, 'Yes', 'No']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys Kinesis Data Stream with throughput monitoring alarms for real-time ingestion.

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyDataStream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
  RetentionPeriodHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24
  AlarmReadThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1000000
  AlarmWriteThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 500000
  AlarmActionsTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''

Conditions:
  UseAlarmActions: !Not [!Equals [!Ref AlarmActionsTopicArn, '']]

Resources:
  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${StreamName}-Stream"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  HighReadThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${StreamName}-HighReadThroughput"
      AlarmDescription: !Sub "Alerts when read throughput exceeds ${AlarmReadThreshold} bytes over 10 minutes indicating potential overload."
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: GetRecords.Bytes
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref DataStream
      Period: 300
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmReadThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      AlarmActions: !If [UseAlarmActions, [!Ref AlarmActionsTopicArn], []]

  HighWriteThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${StreamName}-HighWriteThroughput"
      AlarmDescription: !Sub "Alerts when write throughput exceeds ${AlarmWriteThreshold} bytes over 10 minutes indicating potential overload."
      Metrics:
        - Id: writeTotal
          Expression: putrecord + putrecords
          Label: Write Throughput (Bytes)
          ReturnData: true
        - Id: putrecord
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
              MetricName: PutRecord.Bytes
              Dimensions:
                - Name: StreamName
                  Value: !Ref DataStream
            Period: 300
            Stat: Sum
          ReturnData: false
        - Id: putrecords
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
              MetricName: PutRecords.TotalBytes
              Dimensions:
                - Name: StreamName
                  Value: !Ref DataStream
            Period: 300
            Stat: Sum
          ReturnData: false
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmWriteThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      AlarmActions: !If [UseAlarmActions, [!Ref AlarmActionsTopicArn], []]

  IteratorAgeExceededAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${StreamName}-IteratorAgeExceeded"
      AlarmDescription: "Alerts when Iterator Age exceeds 10 seconds indicating read processing delays."
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref DataStream
      Period: 60
      Statistic: Maximum
      Threshold: 10000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      AlarmActions: !If [UseAlarmActions, [!Ref AlarmActionsTopicArn], []]

Outputs:
  DataStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref DataStream
  DataStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
  HighReadThroughputAlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the High Read Throughput Alarm
    Value: !Ref HighReadThroughputAlarm
  HighWriteThroughputAlarmArn:
    Description: ARN of the High Write Throughput Alarm
    Value: !Ref HighWriteThroughputAlarm

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates a KMS Key and Alias for centralized encryption management.

Parameters:
  KeyDescription:
    Type: String
    Default: KMS key for centralized encryption management across AWS services
    Description: Description for the KMS key.
  AliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/central-encryption-key
    Description: Alias name for the KMS key.

Resources:
  CentralEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Ref KeyDescription
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow account usage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Sid: Require MFA for sensitive root actions
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:UpdateKeyDescription
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalARN: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: "false"
          - Sid: Enforce TLS transport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"
      Tags:
        - Key: Key
          Value: CentralEncryption
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  CentralEncryptionAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref AliasName
      TargetKeyId: !GetAtt CentralEncryptionKey.Arn

Outputs:
  CentralEncryptionKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the Central Encryption KMS Key
    Value: !GetAtt CentralEncryptionKey.Arn
  CentralEncryptionAliasArn:
    Description: ARN of the Central Encryption KMS Alias
    Value: !Ref CentralEncryptionAlias
  CentralEncryptionAliasName:
    Description: Name of the Central Encryption KMS Alias
    Value: !Ref AliasName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a private Amazon Route 53 Hosted Zone for internal DNS management within a VPC.'

Parameters:
  DomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: www.example.com
    Description: The domain name for the private hosted zone.
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InternalVPC
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  HostedZone:
    Type: AWS::Route53::HostedZone
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${DomainName}.'
      VPCs:
        - VPCId: !Ref VPC
          VPCRegion: !Ref AWS::Region

  DNSRecords:
    Type: AWS::Route53::RecordSetGroup
    Properties:
      HostedZoneId: !Ref HostedZone
      RecordSets:
        - Name: !Sub '${DomainName}.'
          Type: A
          TTL: '300'
          ResourceRecords:
            - 10.0.0.10

Outputs:
  HostedZoneId:
    Description: The ID of the private hosted zone.
    Value: !Ref HostedZone
  HostedZoneNameServers:
    Description: The name servers for the hosted zone.
    Value:
      Fn::Join:
        - ', '
        - !GetAtt HostedZone.NameServers
  VPCId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC.
    Value: !Ref VPC

Description: 'CloudFormation template for a publicly accessible Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances across AZs, custom DB cluster and instance parameter groups enforcing time_zone=UTC, sql_mode, backup settings, in a VPC with two public subnets.'

  MasterUsername:

    Default: admin

  DBClusterIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: aurora-mysql-cluster
  EngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 8.0.mysql_aurora.3.02.0

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  IGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Public subnets for Aurora MySQL cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL allowing inbound 3306 from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for Aurora encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root account permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow RDS service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  DBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Description: Master password for Aurora DB cluster
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"MasterUserPassword":"<placeholder>"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'MasterUserPassword'
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'

  DBClusterParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Custom cluster parameter group for Aurora MySQL
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        backup_retention_period: 7
        preferred_backup_window: 03:00-04:00

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Custom instance parameter group for Aurora MySQL
      Family: aurora-mysql8.0
      Parameters:
        time_zone: UTC
        sql_mode: ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY,STRICT_TRANS_TABLES,ERROR_FOR_DIVISION_BY_ZERO,NO_AUTO_CREATE_USER,NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION

  DBCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: !Ref EngineVersion
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref DBSecret
        KmsKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - error
        - general
        - slowquery
      DBClusterParameterGroupName: !Ref DBClusterParameterGroup

  WriterDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-writer'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      PromotionTier: 1
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

  ReaderDBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${DBClusterIdentifier}-reader'
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      PromotionTier: 10
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']

Outputs:
  ClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster writer endpoint address for connectivity
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster reader endpoint address for read queries
    Value: !GetAtt DBCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  WriterInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: Writer DB instance endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt WriterDBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: Reader DB instance endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt ReaderDBInstance.Endpoint.Address
  SecretArn:
    Description: Secrets Manager secret ARN containing the master password
    Value: !Ref DBSecret

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a multi-AZ publicly accessible Aurora MySQL cluster with two db.t3.large instances across two public subnets and error log exports to CloudWatch Logs.

Parameters:
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: admin
    Description: Master username for the Aurora cluster
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  DBClusterIdentifier:
    Type: String
    Default: aurora-cluster
  AllowedCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR for DB access

Resources:
  AuroraVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  AuroraIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"

  AuroraIGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref AuroraIGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet-2"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref AuroraIGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  AuroraSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnets for multi-AZ Aurora deployment
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-subnetgroup"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-subnetgroup"

  AuroraDBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora MySQL cluster allowing inbound 3306 from allowed CIDR
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '3306'
          ToPort: '3306'
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedCidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-aurora-sg"

  AuroraMasterUserSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub "Master user secret for Aurora cluster ${DBClusterIdentifier}"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username": "${MasterUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 40
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-master-secret"

  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    Properties:
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref DBClusterIdentifier
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.mysql_aurora.3.12.0
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret:
        KmsKeyId: alias/aws/rds
        SecretArn: !Ref AuroraMasterUserSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AuroraDBSecurityGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: alias/aws/rds
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: 03:00-04:00
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: Sun:05:00-Sun:06:00
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref DBClusterIdentifier

  AuroraPrimary:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: AuroraPrimary
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AuroraDBSecurityGroup
      PromotionTier: 1

  AuroraReader:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: AuroraReader
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.large
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref AuroraDBSecurityGroup
      PromotionTier: 2

Outputs:
  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora Cluster Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  PrimaryInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: Primary Instance Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraPrimary.Endpoint.Address
  ReaderInstanceEndpoint:
    Description: Reader Instance Endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraReader.Endpoint.Address
  AuroraSubnetGroup:
    Description: DB Subnet Group Name
    Value: !Ref AuroraSubnetGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a simple "Hello World" Lambda function.'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaExecutionRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: HelloWorldDemo

  HelloWorldFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log("hello world");
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify("hello world")
            };
          };
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: HelloWorldDemo

Outputs:
  FunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda Function for invocation or integration references.'
    Value: !GetAtt HelloWorldFunction.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FunctionArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with a single public subnet, Internet Gateway, and associated routing infrastructure to enable internet accessibility for resources, providing foundational networking for demonstrations like CloudWatch EC2 auto-alarms.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchEC2AutoAlarms

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchEC2AutoAlarms

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchEC2AutoAlarms

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Demo
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchEC2AutoAlarms

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: ID of the public subnet
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetId'
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: ID of the public route table
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM role and instance profile for EC2 instances to integrate with Amazon CloudWatch and AWS Systems Manager (SSM)'

Resources:
  EC2SSMCloudWatchRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMCloudWatchRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy

  EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMCloudWatchRole

Outputs:
  InstanceProfileArn:
    Description: ARN of the EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile
    Value: !GetAtt EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileArn"

  InstanceProfileName:
    Description: Name of the EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile
    Value: !Ref EC2SSMCloudWatchInstanceProfile
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileName"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template creating a VPC, Security Group, S3 Bucket, and DynamoDB Table with deletion protection.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group with no inbound rules and outbound HTTPS only
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-s3-encryption-key'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'my-unique-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub 'my-unique-table-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: timestamp
          AttributeType: N
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: timestamp
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-3cd633e1' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-3cd633e1: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DynamoDBTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'DynamoDBTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3EncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3EncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-3cd633e1: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public and two private subnets across two AZs, route tables, and internet routing for public subnets.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  VPCDhcpOptions:
    Type: AWS::EC2::DHCPOptions
    Properties:
      DomainNameServers:
        - AmazonProvidedDNS

  VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      DhcpOptionsId: !Ref VPCDhcpOptions

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.64.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.65.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet 1 (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: ID of Public Subnet 2 (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: ID of Private Subnet 1 (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1Id'

  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: ID of Private Subnet 2 (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2Id'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: ID of the Public Route Table
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: ID of the Private Route Table
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTableId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure, web-based VS Code development environment using code-server on EC2 behind CloudFront for demo use.'

Parameters:
  CodeServerVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '4.22.0'
    Description: 'Version of code-server to install'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: 't3.medium'
    Description: 'EC2 instance type'
  CloudFrontPrefixListId:
    Type: String
    Description: 'AWS-managed CloudFront regional edge prefix list ID (find in VPC console under Managed prefix lists, e.g., pl-68b3d7bd for CloudFront Regional IPs)'
  KeyPairName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'Optional EC2 KeyPair name for SSH fallback access (leave empty to skip)'
  UbuntuAMI:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/canonical/ubuntu/server/22.04/stable/current/amd64/hvm/ebs-gp3/ami-id'
    Description: 'Ubuntu 22.04 LTS AMI ID resolved via SSM parameter'

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyPairName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  Public

Description: "Creates an Amazon ECS cluster configured to leverage both Fargate and Fargate Spot capacity providers for flexible task placement."

      ClusterSettings:
        - Name: containerInsights
          Value: enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ECSCluster"

    Value: !GetAtt FargateHybridCluster.Arn
  ClusterName:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECS Fargate NGINX demo task definition with IAM roles for task execution, SSM ExecuteCommand support, and CloudWatch Logs integration.'
Resources:
  NginxDemoLogGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::Logs::LogGroup'
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: '/ecs/nginx-demo'
      RetentionInDays: 7
  ECSTaskExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'ECSTaskExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:*:${AWS::AccountId}:task/*'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy'
  ECSTaskRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'ECSTaskRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ecs:*:${AWS::AccountId}:task/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'SSMExecuteCommandPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel'
                  - 'ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel'
                  - 'ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel'
                  - 'ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel'
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:log-group:/aws/ecs/exec/*'
  NginxDemoTaskDefinition:
    Type: 'AWS::ECS::TaskDefinition'
    Properties:
      Family: 'nginx-demo'
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      NetworkMode: 'awsvpc'
      Cpu: '256'
      Memory: '512'
      TaskRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
      ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: 'nginx'
          Image: 'public.ecr.aws/nginx/nginx:latest'
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              Protocol: 'tcp'
          LogConfiguration:
            LogDriver: 'awslogs'
            Options:
              'awslogs-group': !Ref NginxDemoLogGroup
              'awslogs-region': !Ref 'AWS::Region'
              'awslogs-stream-prefix': 'nginx-demo'
Outputs:
  TaskDefinitionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the NginxDemoTaskDefinition'
    Value: !Ref NginxDemoTaskDefinition
  TaskRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ECSTaskRole'
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskRole.Arn
  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the ECSTaskExecutionRole'
    Value: !GetAtt ECSTaskExecutionRole.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: 'Name of the CloudWatch Log Group'
    Value: !Ref NginxDemoLogGroup
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-fa0a8fa7' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-fa0a8fa7: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ECSTaskExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ECSTaskExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ECSTaskRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ECSTaskRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'NginxDemoLogGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NginxDemoLogGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'NginxDemoTaskDefinition: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NginxDemoTaskDefinition: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-fa0a8fa7: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Windows EC2 for CPU stress testing with SSM and FIS'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: Required; use default VPC ID for fallback subnet logic
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Default: ''
    Description: Subnet ID (leave empty for first subnet in provided VPC)
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.small
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.nano
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
    Description: EC2 instance type
  StressDurationMinutes:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 60
    Description: Duration of CPU stress test in minutes
  KeyPairName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 KeyPair for RDP access
  RDPCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '0.0.0.0/0'
    Description: CIDR allowed for RDP access (restrict for production)

Conditions:
  UseDefaultSubnet: !Equals [!Ref SubnetId, '']
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyPairName, '']]

Resources:
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2Role'
    AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
          Action: sts:AssumeRole
    ManagedPolicyArns:
      - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Roles:
      - !Ref EC2Role

  FISRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISRole'
    AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            Service: fis.amazonaws.com
          Action: sts:AssumeRole
    Policies:
      - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FISInlinePolicy'
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - ssm:SendCommand
                - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
              Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:instance/*'
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - ec2:DescribeInstances
                - ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus
              Resource: '*'
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - logs:CreateLogGroup
                - logs:CreateLogStream
                - logs:PutLogEvents
                - logs:DescribeLogGroups
                - logs:DescribeLogStreams
              Resource: '*'

  SSMDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CPUStressTest'
    DocumentType: Command
    DocumentFormat: JSON
    Content: !Sub >
      {
        "schemaVersion": "2.2",
        "description": "CPU Stress Test using PowerShell - spawns threads equal to logical processors",
        "parameters": {
          "StressDurationMinutes": {
            "type": "Number",
            "description": "Duration in minutes (1-60)",
            "default": 5
          }
        },
        "mainSteps": [
          {
            "action": "aws:runPowerShellScript",
            "name": "cpuStressTest",
            "inputs": {
              "runCommand": [
                "$logicalCores = ((Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_Processor | Select-Object -ExpandProperty NumberOfLogicalProcessors) | Measure-Object -Sum).Sum",
                "$durationMinutes = {{ StressDurationMinutes }}",
                "$endTime = (Get-Date).AddMinutes($durationMinutes)",
                "Write-Output \"Starting CPU stress test on $logicalCores logical cores for $durationMinutes minutes. End time: $endTime\"",
                "$jobs = @()",
                "1..$logicalCores | ForEach-Object { $jobs += Start-Job -ScriptBlock { while ((Get-Date) -lt $using:endTime) { $sum = 0; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 100000; $i++) { $sum += [math]::Pow(2, 10) } } } }",
                "$jobs | Wait-Job | Receive-Job",
                "Remove-Job $jobs -Force",
                "Write-Output \"CPU stress test completed successfully.\""
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    GroupDescription: 'Allow RDP, SSM HTTPS and all outbound for SSM CPU stress tester'
    VpcId: !Ref VpcId
    SecurityGroupIngress:
      - IpProtocol: tcp
        FromPort: 3389
        ToPort: 3389
        CidrIp: !Ref RDPCIDR
      - IpProtocol: tcp
        FromPort: 443
        ToPort: 443
        CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
    SecurityGroupEgress:
      - IpProtocol: -1
        CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG'

  WindowsEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    ImageId: !Sub 'resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base:${AWS::Region}'
    InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
    SubnetId: !If
      - UseDefaultSubnet
      - !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZSubnets !Ref VpcId
      - !Ref SubnetId
    SecurityGroupIds:
      - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
    IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
    KeyName: !If
      - UseKeyPair
      - !Ref KeyPairName
      - !Ref AWS::NoValue
    UserData:
      Fn::Base64:
        Fn::Join:
          - ''
          -
            - 'powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "'
            - 'Restart-Service AmazonSSMAgent -Force; '
            - 'Start-Sleep 120; '
            - 'cfn-signal.exe -e 0 --stack '
            - {Ref: AWS::StackName}
            - ' --resource WindowsEC2Instance --region '
            - {Ref: AWS::Region}
            - '; 1'
            - '"'
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT20M
    DependsOn:
      - InstanceProfile
      - SSMDocument
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsStressTester'
      - Key: Stack
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: 'EC2 Instance ID for CPU stress testing via SSM'
    Value: !Ref WindowsEC2Instance
  InstancePublicIp:
    Description: 'Public IP for RDP access (if launched in public subnet)'
    Value: !GetAtt WindowsEC2Instance.PublicIp
  InstancePublicDnsName:
    Description: 'Public DNS Name for RDP (if applicable)'
    Value: !GetAtt WindowsEC2Instance.PublicDnsName
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: 'SSM Document Name for CPU Stress Test'
    Value: !Ref SSMDocument
  FISRoleArn:
    Description: 'IAM Role ARN for FIS to trigger SSM commands and manage resources'
    Value: !GetAtt FISRole.Arn
  EC2RoleArn:
    Description: 'IAM Role ARN attached to EC2 instance for SSM'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Role.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates four IAM roles with tiered permissions for Fault Injection Simulator (FIS) access controls: Security Admins (full FIS access), Admins (FIS access except prod), Users (limited FIS actions except prod), and Non-Users (read-only AWS with FIS deny). Includes conditional role-passing for FIS and workshop roles.'

Resources:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISSecurityAdminRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess

  FISAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISAdminRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess

  FISUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISUserRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess

  FISNonUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: FISNonUserRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess

  ConditionalFISPassRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: ConditionalFISPassRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Environment-specific DynamoDB tables for SupporterProductData with PROD provisioned throughput and auto-scaling, CODE on-demand, encryption, TTL, and PITR backups."

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["PROD", "CODE"]
    Default: "CODE"
    Description: "Deployment stage (PROD or CODE) to apply environment-specific DynamoDB configurations."

Conditions:
  IsPROD: !Equals [!Ref Stage, "PROD"]

Resources:
  SupporterProductDataTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: "supporterId"
          AttributeType: "S"
        - AttributeName: "productId"
          AttributeType: "S"
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: "supporterId"
          KeyType: "HASH"
        - AttributeName: "productId"
          KeyType: "RANGE"
      BillingMode: !If [IsPROD, "PROVISIONED", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If [IsPROD, {ReadCapacityUnits: 20, WriteCapacityUnits: 5}, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        AttributeName: "expiryDate"
        Enabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: "Backup"
          Value: "Enabled"
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "SupporterProductData-${Stage}"

  WriteScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsPROD
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub "table/${SupporterProductDataTable}"
      RoleARN: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/service-role/ApplicationAutoScalingDynamoDBTable"
      ScalableDimension: "dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits"
      ServiceNamespace: "dynamodb"

  WriteScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsPROD
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub "${SupporterProductDataTable}-WriteTargetTrackingScalingPolicy"
      PolicyType: "TargetTrackingScaling"
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteScalableTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: "DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization"
        TargetValue: 0.7
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60
        ScaleInCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: "Name of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table"
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductDataTable
  TableArn:
    Description: "ARN of the SupporterProductData DynamoDB table"
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductDataTable.Arn
  BillingMode:
    Description: "Billing mode and capacity details"
    Value: !If [IsPROD, "PROVISIONED (20 RCU / 5 WCU with auto-scaling)", "PAY_PER_REQUEST"]

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates three IAM managed policies: S3 access for iOS app, DynamoDB protection, and RDS protection.'

Resources:
  S3AccessForIOSApp:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Grants iOS app access to specific S3 bucket'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions in DynamoDB to prevent accidental data loss'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Blocks destructive RDS operations to safeguard databases and backups'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 Access Policy for iOS App'
    Value: !Ref S3AccessForIOSApp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicyArn'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy'
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn'

  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the RDS Protection Policy'
    Value: !Ref RDSProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Creates an IAM role assumable exclusively by the Bedrock service within the same AWS account for Bedrock agents. Grants permissions to invoke foundation models, manage agent resources, and invoke Lambda functions for custom logic integration."

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "bedrock.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceAccount":
                  Ref: "AWS::AccountId"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "BedrockAgentPermissions"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "bedrock:InvokeModel"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-model/*"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "bedrock:*"
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "lambda:InvokeFunction"
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "BedrockAgentServiceRole"
        - Key: "ManagedBy"
          Value: "CloudFormation"
