AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Creates a production-ready, encrypted S3 bucket for ALB access logs with enforced bucket
  ownership, full public access blocks, 90-day lifecycle retention policy for automatic
  deletion of old logs, versioning enabled, and a bucket policy compliant with AWS requirements
  for ALB logging (allowing delivery.logs.amazonaws.com and regional ELB service accounts
  to write logs) while enforcing HTTPS-only access.
Parameters:
  ElbLogAccountId1:
    Type: String
    Default: '127311923021'
    Description: >-
      First AWS account ID for ELB/ALB log delivery service principal
      in this region (typically 2 accounts). Customize per AWS documentation for your region.
      Example defaults for us-east-1.
  ElbLogAccountId2:
    Type: String
    Default: '033776778936'
    Description: >-
      Second AWS account ID for ELB/ALB log delivery service principal
      in this region (typically 2 accounts). Customize per AWS documentation for your region.
      Example defaults for us-east-1.
Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for ALB access logs bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DefaultAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowELBAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ElbLogAccountId1}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ElbLogAccountId2}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::RandomUUID}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ALBAccessLogsKMSKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ALBAccessLogs
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ALBLogDeliveryService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource:
              Fn::Join:
                - ''
                - - !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
                  - '/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: ALBServiceAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ElbLogAccountId1}:root'
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${ElbLogAccountId2}:root'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource:
              Fn::Join:
                - ''
                - - !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
                  - /AWSLogs/
                  - !Ref AWS::AccountId
                  - '/*'
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              Fn::Join:
                - ''
                - - !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
                  - '/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: The name of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: The ARN of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  BucketSecureUrl:
    Description: The secure HTTPS URL endpoint for the bucket
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ALBAccessLogsBucket}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketSecureUrl'
  KeyId:
    Description: The ID of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsKMSKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyId'
  KeyArn:
    Description: The ARN of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsKMSKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Deploys an AWS Transit Gateway with predefined BGP settings (ASN 65000),
  automatic attachment acceptance, and default route propagation/association,
  along with a RAM Resource Share to centralize and simplify network connectivity
  across multiple VPCs and AWS accounts, shared with the specified target account.
Parameters:
  TargetAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: "644519422710"
    Description: AWS account ID to share the Transit Gateway with via RAM.
Resources:
  TransitGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::TransitGateway
    Properties:
      AmazonSideAsn: 65000
      AutoAcceptSharedAttachments: enable
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: enable
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: enable
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGateway'
  TransitGatewayShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TGWShare'
      ResourceArns:
        - !GetAtt TransitGateway.TransitGatewayArn
      Principals:
        - !Ref TargetAccountId
Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Description: ID of the Transit Gateway for cross-stack references and attachments.
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId'
  ResourceShareId:
    Description: ARN of the RAM Resource Share for Transit Gateway. Use this for cross-account integration with VPC attachments or other networking components.
    Value: !GetAtt TransitGatewayShare.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cw-export-data-'
    Description: Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name
  VersioningEnabled:
    Type: String
    Default: yes
    AllowedValues:
      - yes
      - no
    Description: Enable or suspend versioning on the bucket
  EnableEncryption:
    Type: String
    Default: yes
    AllowedValues:
      - yes
      - no
    Description: Enable server-side encryption with SSE-KMS (Customer Managed Key)
  TransitionToIADays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 365
    Description: Days after which to transition current versions to STANDARD_IA
  TransitionToGlacierDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 30
    MaxValue: 365
    Description: Days after which to transition current versions to GLACIER
  ExpireDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 3650
    Description: Days after which to expire noncurrent versions

Conditions:
  VersioningEnabledCond: !Equals [!Ref VersioningEnabled, yes]
  EncryptionEnabledCond: !Equals [!Ref EnableEncryption, yes]

Resources:
  ExportDataKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting CloudWatch export data in S3 bucket
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 Service to Use Key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyPair
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}/*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-kms'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportData

  CloudWatchExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration: !If
        - VersioningEnabledCond
        - Status: Enabled
        - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      BucketEncryption:
        Fn::If:
          - EncryptionEnabledCond
          - ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
              - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
                  SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
                  KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ExportDataKmsKey
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionCurrentVersions
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIADays
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
          - Id: TransitionNoncurrentVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 60
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpireDays
          - Id: AbortIncompleteMultipartUploads
            Status: Enabled
            AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload:
              DaysAfterInitiation: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExportData

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceHTTPS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - logs.amazonaws.com
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket}'
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchPutObjects
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - logs.amazonaws.com
                - cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${CloudWatchExportBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
              StringLike:
                's3:prefix': awslogs/*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the created S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref CloudWatchExportBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the created S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CloudWatchExportBucket.Arn
  BucketSecureUrl:
    Description: Secure HTTPS endpoint for the S3 bucket
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CloudWatchExportBucket}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
  KmsKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !Ref ExportDataKmsKey

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create a publicly accessible S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and static assets distribution, with customer-managed KMS key encryption.'

Parameters:
  BucketPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: lambda-artifacts
    Description: 'Prefix for the globally unique S3 bucket name. Full name: BucketPrefix-AWSAccountId-AWSRegion'
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: 'ARN of the imported IAM service role granted granular access to the KMS key'

Conditions:
  ServiceRoleArnProvided:
    !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref ServiceRoleArn
      - ''

Resources:
  LambdaArtifactsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts S3 bucket'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root account full access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Deny access if not from this account'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Sid: 'Allow service role to use CMK'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                !If
                - ServiceRoleArnProvided
                - !Ref ServiceRoleArn
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow service role to manage own grants'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                !If
                - ServiceRoleArnProvided
                - !Ref ServiceRoleArn
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:CreateGrant'
              - 'kms:RetireGrant'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service to decrypt for public reads'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3::${BucketPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-kmskey'

  LambdaArtifactsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArtifactsKey'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey

  LambdaArtifactsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket'

  LambdaArtifactsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:GetObject'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3::${LambdaArtifactsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': true

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and static assets'
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: 'ID of the KMS key (LambdaArtifactsKey)'
    Value: !Ref LambdaArtifactsKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyId'
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key (LambdaArtifactsKey)'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaArtifactsKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyArn'
  KMSKeyAliasArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key alias for simplified referencing'
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/${AWS::StackName}-LambdaArtifactsKey'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyAliasArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Creates an IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 and Lambda resources."

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
                  - servicecatalog:CreateProvisioningArtifact
                  - servicecatalog:DescribeProductView
                  - servicecatalog:SearchProducts
                  - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: IAMManagement
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateRole
                  - iam:DeleteRole
                  - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                  - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                  - iam:PutRolePolicy
                  - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                  - iam:PassRole
                  - iam:GetRole
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/ServiceCatalog*"
        - PolicyName: LambdaLifecycle
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:CreateFunction
                  - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
                  - lambda:DeleteFunction
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - lambda:ListFunctions
                  - lambda:GetFunction
                  - lambda:CreateEventSourceMapping
                Resource: "*"
        - PolicyName: CloudFormationOperations
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:CreateStack

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for secure EC2 Image Builder infrastructure: IAM role and instance profile with SSM and Image Builder permissions, and S3 bucket for build logs.'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: imagebuilder-logs
    Description: 'Prefix for the unique S3 bucket name (appended with Region and AccountId).'

Resources:
  ImageBuilderLogsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for Image Builder logs S3 bucket encryption'
      Enabled: true
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                kms:CallerAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EC2ImageBuilder
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageBuilderLogsKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/imagebuilder-logs-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsKey

  ImageBuilderLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EC2ImageBuilder
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageBuilderLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ImageBuilderInstanceRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ImageBuilderPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeInstances
                  - iam:PassRole
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EC2ImageBuilder
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ImageBuilderLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: ImageBuilderLogsPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ImageBuilderLogsKey.Arn
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

  ImageBuilderInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: ImageBuilderInstanceProfile
      Path: '/'
      Roles:
        - !Ref ImageBuilderInstanceRole

Outputs:
  ImageBuilderInstanceProfileArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Image Builder Instance Profile'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceProfile.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceProfileArn'

  ImageBuilderRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Image Builder Instance Role'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderInstanceRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'

  ImageBuilderLogsBucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the Image Builder Logs S3 Bucket'
    Value: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'

  ImageBuilderLogsBucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Image Builder Logs S3 Bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt ImageBuilderLogsBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Provisions a secure S3 bucket for VPC flow logs with compliance-focused lifecycle rules and access controls.

Parameters:
  VersioningStatus:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
    Default: Enabled
    Description: 'Bucket versioning status.'
  TransitionToGlacierDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Number of days before transitioning objects to Glacier.'
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1
    Description: 'Retention period in days before permanent deletion.'

Resources:
  FlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpcflowlogs-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKMSKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningStatus
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPCFlowLogs
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: !Sub 'Allow VPC Flow Logs delivery to ${AWS::StackName}'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                s3:x-amz-acl: bucket-owner-full-control
          - Sid: !Sub 'Allow VPC Flow Logs GetBucketAcl for ${AWS::StackName}'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}'
          - Sid: !Sub 'DenyUnsecuredTransport for ${AWS::StackName}'
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket.
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket.
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketPolicyStatus:
    Description: Status of the bucket policy enforcement.
    Value: 'Strict access controls enforced: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com only for writes with bucket-owner-full-control ACLs, HTTPS required.'
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for S3 bucket encryption.
    Value: !GetAtt FlowLogsKMSKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Self-configuring EC2 instance with automated Nginx installation via SSM Association and centralized logging to S3 bucket'

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx EC2 instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nginx-sg'

  LogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: S3 logs encryption key
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  LogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-logs-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref LogsKMSKey

  LogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref LogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/logs/*'

  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${LogsBucket}/logs/*'

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole

  NginxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: 'aws:ssm:{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            SecurityGroupIds:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp3
              VolumeSize: 8
              Encrypted: true
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
          InstanceMetadataTags: 'disabled'

  NginxInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateSpecification:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref NginxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt NginxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: '/dev/xvda'
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxInstance
        - Key: SSMTarget
          Value: 'true'

  NginxSSMAssociation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Association
    Properties:
      Name: AWS-RunShellScript
      Parameters:
        commands:
          - sudo yum update -y
          - sudo amazon-linux-extras install nginx1 -y
          - sudo systemctl start nginx
          - sudo systemctl enable nginx
      Targets:
        - Key: tag:SSMTarget
          Values:
            - 'true'
      OutputLocation:
        S3Location:
          OutputS3BucketName: !Ref LogsBucket
          OutputS3KeyPrefix: logs/
    DependsOn: NginxInstance

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref NginxInstance
  LogsBucketName:
    Description: S3 Bucket for SSM logs
    Value: !Ref LogsBucket
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt NginxInstance.PublicDnsName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys an EC2 instance (Amazon Linux 2) with IAM role for SSM, networking, security group, and a custom SSM Automation document for tag-driven OS updates, Nginx installation, reboot handling, and validation.

Parameters:
  MyCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 203.0.113.0/24
    Description: CIDR block allowed for SSH access to the EC2 instance (e.g., 203.0.113.0/24). Use 0.0.0.0/0 for unrestricted access (not recommended for production).

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0ef80457b98d9df2d
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d5d9d301c853a04a
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0badb3ebea6f09eb2
    eu-central-1:
      AMI: ami-0e01e4def50974d1a
    ap-southeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0e86e20dae922d68c
    ap-southeast-2:
      AMI: ami-0a6ed1fa0159b80c5

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance allowing HTTP/HTTPS inbound, SSH from restricted CIDR, and outbound HTTPS/HTTP/DNS for SSM and package repos.
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref MyCidr
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSG"

  SSMEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMEC2Role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SSMEC2Role"

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMEC2Role

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: "enabled"
        HttpTokens: "required"
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 8
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: '0'
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSG
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -x
          exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 2000>/dev/console) 2>&1
          yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap awscli
          until aws ssm describe-instance-information --instance-information-filter-list "Key=InstanceIds,Values=\`curl -s http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id\`" --region ${AWS::Region} --query 'InstanceInformationList[0].PingStatus' --output text 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Online"; do
            echo "Waiting for SSM agent registration..."
            sleep 10
          done
          echo "SSM agent is online!"
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackId} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance"
        - Key: nginx
          Value: "Yes"

  NginxAutomationDocument:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      DocumentType: Automation
      Content:
        schemaVersion: '0.3'
        description: 'Tag-driven automation to update OS (with reboot if needed), install Nginx, and validate the web server.'
        parameters:
          InstanceTagKey:
            type: String
            default: nginx
            description: 'Tag key to target instances (default: nginx)'
          InstanceTagValue:
            type: String
            default: 'Yes'
            description: 'Tag value to target instances (default: Yes)'
        mainSteps:
          - name: getTargetInstances
            action: aws:executeAwsApi
            description: Resolve instance ID from tag
            inputs:
              Service: ec2
              Api: DescribeInstances
              Filters:
                - Name: 'tag:{{InstanceTagKey}}'
                  Values:
                    - '{{InstanceTagValue}}'
              MaxResults: 1
            outputs:
              - Name: InstanceId
                Selector: '$.Reservations[0].Instances[0].InstanceId'
                Type: String
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: updateOS
            action: aws:runCommand
            description: 'Update OS packages (yum-utils plugin creates /var/run/reboot-required if needed)'
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - sudo yum install -y yum-utils
                  - sudo yum update -y
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: checkReboot
            action: aws:runCommand
            description: Check /var/run/reboot-required file
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - test -f /var/run/reboot-required && echo 'true' || echo 'false'
            outputs:
              - Name: RebootRequired
                Selector: '$.Payload[0].StandardOutputContent[0]'
                Type: String
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: rebootBranch
            action: aws:branch
            inputs:
              choices:
                - nextStep: rebootInstance
                  variable: '{{checkReboot.RebootRequired}}'
                  StringEquals: 'true'
              default: installNginx
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: rebootInstance
            action: aws:executeAwsApi
            description: Reboot the instance
            inputs:
              Service: ec2
              Api: RebootInstances
              InstanceIds:
                - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
            next: waitForInstanceReady
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: waitForInstanceReady
            action: aws:waitForAwsResourceProperty
            description: 'Wait for instance to return to running state after potential reboot'
            inputs:
              Service: EC2
              Api: DescribeInstances
              Filters:
                - Name: instance-id
                  Values:
                    - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
              PropertySelector: '$.Reservations[0].Instances[0].State.Name'
              DesiredValues:
                - running
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: installNginx
            action: aws:runCommand
            description: Install and start Nginx
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - sudo yum install -y nginx
                  - sudo systemctl start nginx
                  - sudo systemctl enable nginx
            onFailure: Abort
          - name: validateNginx
            action: aws:runCommand
            description: 'Validate Nginx is responding and active'
            inputs:
              DocumentName: AWS-RunShellScript
              InstanceIds:
                - '{{getTargetInstances.InstanceId}}'
              Parameters:
                commands:
                  - curl -f http://localhost
                  - sudo systemctl is-active --quiet nginx || exit 1
            onFailure: Abort

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance. Tag it with nginx:Yes to trigger the SSM Automation.
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId"

  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP address of the EC2 instance (use for HTTP validation).
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicIp"

  NginxAutomationDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document. Execute via AWS Console/CLI with parameters for tag targeting (e.g., InstanceTagKey=nginx, InstanceTagValue=Yes).
    Value: !Ref NginxAutomationDocument
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NginxAutomationDocumentName"

      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:

        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionIGW
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetA
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 2
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetB
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionNatEIP
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB allowing HTTP/HTTPS from VPC
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALBSecurityGroup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application allowing ALB, SSH, PostgreSQL, and VPC traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AppSecurityGroup
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-internal-alb'
      Scheme: internal
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-internal-alb'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DefaultTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-default-tg'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: 80
      TargetType: ip
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      Matcher:
        HttpCode: 200
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-default-tg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: HTTPS
            Port: '443'
            StatusCode: HTTP_301
            Host: '#{host}'
            Path: '#{path}'
            Query: '#{query}'

  ECRRepo:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: prod-app-repo
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: prod-app-repo
        - Key: Environment
          Value: prod
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  VpcSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/vpc/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/public-subnet/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet

  PrivateSubnetASsm:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/private-subnet-a/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetBSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/private-subnet-b/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

  ALBSGSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/alb-sg/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup

  AppSGSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/app-sg/id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AppSecurityGroup

  ALBListenerSSM:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /prod/alb-listener/arn
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBListener

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Serverless AWS Organizations data pipeline for governance and reporting

Parameters:
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    AllowedPattern: '^[0-9]{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID'
    Description: ID of the AWS Organizations management account
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    Description: Athena/Glue database for cataloging
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'orgdata'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$'
    MinLength: 3
    MaxLength: 40
    ConstraintDescription: 'Valid lowercase S3 prefix (alphanumeric start/end, ., - allowed)'
    Description: Custom S3 bucket name prefix
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Comma-separated list of tags to fetch in reports, e.g., CostCenter,Environment

Resources:
  OrgDataKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for OrgDataBucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernance

  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernance

  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DependsOn: [OrgDataKMSKey, OrgDataBucket]
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: OrgDataAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${ManagementAccountId}:role/OrganizationsReadRole"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub "${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*"
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    's3:prefix': 'org-data/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganization
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
                  - organizations:ListTagsForResource
                  - organizations:ListParents
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !Ref OrgDataKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: OrgGovernance

  OrgDataLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 900
      MemorySize: 512
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import datetime
          from botocore.exceptions import ClientError

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              management_account_id = os.environ['ManagementAccountId']
              tags_to_include = os.environ.get('TagsToInclude', '').split(',')
              bucket_name = os.environ['S3Bucket']

              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              role_arn = f"arn:aws:iam::{management_account_id}:role/OrganizationsReadRole"
              assumed = sts.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataSession'
              )
              creds = assumed['Credentials']

              org = boto3.client(
                  'organizations',
                  aws_access_key_id=creds['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=creds['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=creds['SessionToken']
              )
              s3 = boto3.client('s3')

              data = {
                  'timestamp': datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
                  'organization': org.describe_organization()['Organization'],
                  'accounts': [],
                  'organizational_units': []
              }

              accounts = []
              paginator = org.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  accounts.extend(page['Accounts'])

              for acc in accounts:
                  acc_data = {k: v for k, v in acc.items()}
                  acc_data['tags'] = {}
                  if tags_to_include and tags_to_include != ['']:
                      try:
                          tags_resp = org.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=acc['Id'], ResourceType='ACCOUNT')
                          acc_data['tags'] = {t['Key']: t['Value'] for t in tags_resp.get('Tags', []) if t['Key'] in tags_to_include}
                      except ClientError as e:
                          print(f"Error fetching tags for {acc['Id']}: {e}")
                  try:
                      parents_resp = org.list_parents(AccountId=acc['Id'])
                      acc_data['ou_path'] = [p['Id'] for p in parents_resp['Parents']]
                  except ClientError as e:
                      print(f"Error fetching parents for {acc['Id']}: {e}")
                      acc_data['ou_path'] = []
                  data['accounts'].append(acc_data)

              def get_ous(parent_id, path=None):
                  if path is None:
                      path = []
                  try:
                      resp = org.list_organizational_units_for_parent(ParentId=parent_id)
                      ous = []
                      for ou in resp['OrganizationalUnits']:
                          ou_data = {k: v for k, v in ou.items()}
                          ou_data['path'] = path + [ou['Name']]
                          ous.append(ou_data)
                          child_ous = get_ous(ou['Id'], ou_data['path'])
                          ous.extend(child_ous

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys AWS Amplify TodoApp with production branch hosting

Resources:
  AmplifyTodoAppServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a secure, multi-AZ VPC with public and private subnets across us-east-1a and us-east-1b, NAT Gateways for private subnet outbound connectivity, following AWS Well-Architected security best practices.'

Parameters:
  VPCcidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1 in us-east-1a
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2 in us-east-1b
  PrivateSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.3.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 1 in us-east-1a
  PrivateSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.4.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for Private Subnet 2 in us-east-1b
  AvailabilityZone1:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1a
    Description: Availability Zone for first AZ subnets
  AvailabilityZone2:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1b
    Description: Availability Zone for second AZ subnets
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Prod
    Description: Environment tag for cost allocation
  Owner:
    Type: String
    Default: Engineering
    Description: Owner tag for governance

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCcidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone1
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1A'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone2
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2B'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone1
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1A'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref AvailabilityZone2
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2Cidr
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2B'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EIP2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NATGateway2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable1'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable2'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref Owner
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID (us-east-1a)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID (us-east-1b)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 1 ID (us-east-1a)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private Subnet 2 ID (us-east-1b)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
  NATGateway1Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 1 ID (us-east-1a)
    Value: !Ref NATGateway1
  NATGateway2Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway 2 ID (us-east-1b)
    Value: !Ref NATGateway2
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PrivateRouteTable1Id:
    Description: Private Route Table 1 ID (us-east-1a)
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
  PrivateRouteTable2Id:
    Description: Private Route Table 2 ID (us-east-1b)
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Standardized IAM baseline for secure role-based access and cross-account governance

Parameters:
  IdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: "000000000000"
    Description: Account ID for Identity Management
  ToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: "000000000000"
    Description: Account ID for Tooling Management
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: "dummy-external-id"
    Description: External ID for secure cross-account role assumption
  PrincipalOrgID:
    Type: String
    Default: "o-123456789012"
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx) for StackSets
  CurrentRegion:
    Type: String
    Default: "us-east-1"
    Description: Current AWS Region for policy conditions

Resources:
  PrivilegedAdminPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: PrivilegedAdminPolicy
      Description: Privileged admin access with MFA requirements for elevated actions and denies for sensitive services
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
        - Sid: DenySensitiveServices
          Effect: Deny
          Action:
          - 'billing:*'
          - 'cloudhsm:*'
          Resource: '*'
        - Sid: DenyElevatedWithoutMFA
          Effect: Deny
          Action: '*'
          Resource: '*'
          Condition:
            Bool:
              'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': false
            ForAnyValue:StringNotLike:
              'aws:Action':
              - '*:Describe*'
              - '*:List*'
              - '*:Get*'
              - '*:Head*'
        - Sid: DenyElevatedOldMFA
          Effect: Deny
          Action: '*'
          Resource: '*'
          Condition:
            NumericGreaterThan:
              'aws:MultiFactorAuthAge': 43200
            ForAnyValue:StringNotLike:
              'aws:Action':
              - '*:Describe*'
              - '*:List*'
              - '*:Get*'
              - '*:Head*'

  PrivilegedAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: PrivilegedAdminRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            AWS:
            - Fn::Sub:
              - 'arn:aws:iam::${IdentityManagementAccountId}:root'
              - IdentityManagementAccountId: !Ref IdentityManagementAccountId
            - Fn::Sub:
              - 'arn:aws:iam::${ToolingManagementAccountId}:root'
              - ToolingManagementAccountId: !Ref ToolingManagementAccountId

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for VPC with Flow Logs delivered to a secure S3 bucket with SSL enforcement, public access blocked, server-side encryption, and minimal permissions for log delivery.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
    AllowedValues:
      - ALL
      - ACCEPT
      - REJECT
  LogFormat:
    Type: String
    Default: '${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status} ${vpc-id} ${subnet-id} ${instance-id} ${pkt-src-aws-service} ${pkt-dst-aws-service} ${flow-direction} ${traffic-path} ${pkt-src-aws-instance-id} ${pkt-dst-aws-instance-id}'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  FlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow use of the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecuredTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogsGetBucketAcl
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}'

  VPCFlowLogsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: vpc-flow-logs.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PutObjectToFlowLogsBucket
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow

      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      LogDestination: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogPrefix}'

      DeliverLogsPermissionArn: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsRole.Arn
      LogFormat: !Ref LogFormat

      DestinationOptions:

        HiveCompatiblePartitions: false

      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC-Flow-Logs
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

    Value: !Ref VPC
  FlowLogId:
    Description: 'ID of the VPC Flow Log resource for monitoring'
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLog
  FlowLogsKMSKeyId:
    Description: 'KMS Key ID used for encrypting VPC Flow Logs S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsKMSKey
