AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Risk Management System with Lambda, DynamoDB, and SNS'

Resources:
  RiskManagementTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTable-${AWS::Region}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  LambdaRiskExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRiskExecutionRole-${AWS::Region}'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'lambda:FunctionVersion': '$LATEST'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaDynamoDBLogsPolicy-${AWS::Region}'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                  - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
                  - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${RiskManagementTable}'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RiskLambdaFunction1:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskLambdaFunction1-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
              table = dynamodb.Table(os.environ['TableName'])
              # placeholder logic
              table.put_item(Item={'workload_id': 'test', 'question_id': '1', 'risk': 'low'})
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Risk processed')
              }
      Timeout: 60
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TableName: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RiskLambdaFunction2:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskLambdaFunction2-${AWS::Region}'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
              table = dynamodb.Table(os.environ['TableName'])
              # placeholder logic
              table.put_item(Item={'workload_id': 'test', 'question_id': '2', 'risk': 'medium'})
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Risk processed')
              }
      Timeout: 60
      MemorySize: 256
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRiskExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TableName: !Ref RiskManagementTable
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RiskSNSTopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for Risk SNS Topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access to KMS key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service to use KMS key'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/*'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RiskNotificationsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RiskTopic-${AWS::Region}'
      DisplayName: 'Risk Management Notifications'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref RiskSNSTopicKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: RiskManagement
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  RiskNotificationsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowOpsCenterPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: opscenter.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  RiskManagementTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB Risk Management Table'
    Value: !Ref RiskManagementTable
  RiskManagementTableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB Risk Management Table'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskManagementTable.Arn
  RiskLambdaFunction1Name:
    Description: 'Name of the first Risk Lambda Function'
    Value: !Ref RiskLambdaFunction1
  RiskLambdaFunction1Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the first Risk Lambda Function'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskLambdaFunction1.Arn
  RiskLambdaFunction2Name:
    Description: 'Name of the second Risk Lambda Function'
    Value: !Ref RiskLambdaFunction2
  RiskLambdaFunction2Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the second Risk Lambda Function'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskLambdaFunction2.Arn
  RiskNotificationsTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Risk Notifications Topic'
    Value: !Ref RiskNotificationsTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure, monitored PHP/Apache web server environment with VPC, EC2, CloudWatch, SSM, and S3 logging bucket.

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (SSM recommended)
  AllowedSSH:
    Type: String
    Default: '192.0.2.0/24'
    Description: CIDR block for SSH access (restrict for production)

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Mappings:
  AmazonLinux2023:
    us-east-1:
      amd64: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      amd64: ami-0d9585d0df63551b3
    us-west-1:
      amd64: ami-0a5c3558529278c11
    us-west-2:
      amd64: ami-0a1eb606adc1c5d07
    eu-west-1:
      amd64: ami-0fe7495c64c97b5b9
    ap-southeast-1:
      amd64: ami-0d3f78c93d0d933e6

Resources:
  WebAppVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebAppVPC
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureWebApp

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WebAppIGW
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureWebApp

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureWebApp

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecureWebApp

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
    DependsOn: AttachGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  WebServerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for web server allowing HTTP and SSH
      VpcId: !Ref WebAppVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        -

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that provisions an S3 bucket with server-side encryption and public access blocks, an SNS topic, and configures the bucket to send notifications to the topic for all s3:ObjectCreated:* events. The SNS topic policy authorizes only the S3 service from this bucket and account to publish.'

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'cfn-s3sns-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::Partition}-bucket'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: aws/s3
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !GetAtt Topic.TopicArn

  SnsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable IAM User Permissions'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS Service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              StringEquals:
                'kms:CallerAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

  Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}Topic'
      DisplayName: 'S3 Object Created Notifications'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsKmsKey

  BucketTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref Topic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow-S3-Publish'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}'
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket. Upload objects to test notifications.'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  TopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic. Subscribe via SNS console to receive/verify notifications.'
    Value: !Ref Topic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a REST API Gateway integrated with an SQS queue to enable HTTP-based retrieval of messages via a web endpoint.'

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SQS queue encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSQS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: AllowRoot
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowAPIGatewayRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SQS-API-Gateway-Integration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  MessageRetrievalQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: MessageRetrievalQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SQS-API-Gateway-Integration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SqsReceiveMessagePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                Resource: !GetAtt SqsEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SQS-API-Gateway-Integration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  MessageRetrievalApi:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi'
    Properties:
      Name: MessageRetrievalApi
      Description: REST API for SQS message retrieval
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/xml
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SQS-API-Gateway-Integration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  MessagesResource:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Resource'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Method'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: false
        method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: false
        method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout: false
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseModels:
            application/json: Empty
            application/xml: Empty
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
        ContentHandling: CONVERT_TO_TEXT
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.querystring.Action: 'ReceiveMessage'
          integration.request.querystring.Version: '2012-11-05'
          integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: 'method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages'
          integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: 'method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds'
          integration.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout: 'method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            SelectionPattern: '.*'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #set($inputRoot = $inputPath('$.ReceiveMessageResult.Messages'))
                #if($inputRoot && $inputRoot.size() > 0)
                {
                  "messages": [
                  #foreach($msg in $inputRoot)
                    {
                      "messageId": "$msg.MessageId",
                      "receiptHandle": "$msg.ReceiptHandle",
                      "body": "$util.urlDecode($msg.Body)"
                    }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                  #end
                  ]
                }
                #else
                []
                #end

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment'
    DependsOn: GetMessagesMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      Description: 'Deployment for prod stage'

  ProdStage:
    Type: 'AWS::ApiGateway::Stage'
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MessageRetrievalApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      TracingEnabled: true
      MethodSettings:
        - LoggingLevel: INFO
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          HttpMethod: '*'
          ResourcePath: '/*/*'
          MetricsEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: SQS-API-Gateway-Integration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MessageRetrievalQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: 'API Gateway endpoint URL for retrieving SQS messages'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${MessageRetrievalApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/messages'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiEndpoint'

  SqsQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS MessageRetrievalQueue'
    Value: !Ref MessageRetrievalQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SqsQueueUrl'

  ExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by API Gateway to access SQS'
    Value: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySqsExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ExecutionRoleArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure AWS Cognito user management system for applications while enforcing admin-managed user provisioning.'

Parameters:
  UserPoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'TestUserPool'
    Description: 'Name of the Cognito User Pool'
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test'
    Description: 'Domain prefix for the hosted UI (e.g., myapp-auth)'
  ClientName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'TestClient'
    Description: 'Name of the User Pool App Client'
  CallbackUrls:
    Type: String
    Default: 'http://localhost:3000/callback'
    Description: 'Comma-delimited OAuth callback URLs (e.g., https://myapp.com/callback)'
  LogoutUrls:
    Type: String
    Default: 'http://localhost:3000/'
    Description: 'Comma-delimited sign-out redirect URLs'

Resources:
  UserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Ref UserPoolName
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
      AccountRecoverySetting:
        RecoveryMechanisms:
          - Name: verified_email
            Priority: 1
      Schema:
        - Name: name
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          Required: true
          StringAttributeConstraints:
            MinLength: '0'
            MaxLength: '2048'
        - Name: email
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: false
          Required: true
          StringAttributeConstraints:
            MinLength: '0'
            MaxLength: '2048'
        - Name: phone_number
          AttributeDataType: String
          Mutable: true
          StringAttributeConstraints:
            MinLength: '0'
            MaxLength: '20'

  UserPoolDomain:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge-to-MongoDB integration for routing application events to MongoDB API endpoint with DLQ fault tolerance.'

Resources:
  CustomEventBus:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::EventBus'
    Properties:
      Name: CustomEventBus

  EventBridgeApiRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeApiDestinationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn

  SQSCMK:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:DeadLetterQueue'

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: DeadLetterQueue
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSCMK

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt RouteToMongoDBRule.Arn

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Connection'
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: test_name
          ApiKeyValue: test_value

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::ApiDestination'
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBApiDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://www.testanu.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  RouteToMongoDBRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref CustomEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - myapp
        'detail-type':
          - MongoDBLogEvent
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiRole.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  CustomEventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Custom EventBus'
    Value: !Ref CustomEventBus
  MongoDBApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the MongoDB API Destination'
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Dead Letter Queue'
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
  RouteToMongoDBRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the RouteToMongoDB Rule'
    Value: !GetAtt RouteToMongoDBRule.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a cross-account private API Gateway integrated with Lambda, secured via VPC endpoint and custom domain.

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Default: "vpce-0123456789abcdef0"
    Description: ARN of the VPC Endpoint allowed to access the private API
  CustomDomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: "api.example.local"
    Description: Custom domain name for the API Gateway (e.g., api.example.com)
  AcmCertificateArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
    Description: ARN of the ACM certificate for the custom domain
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Stage name for the API deployment

Resources:
  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PrivateApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': 'Hello from private Lambda!'
              }
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PrivateApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  LambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/*'

  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: PrivateApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
      Policy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PrivateApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ProxyResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: '{proxy+}'

  ProxyMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ProxyResource
      HttpMethod: ANY
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${LambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations'

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
    DependsOn: ProxyMethod

  Stage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref Deployment
      StageName: !Ref StageName

  CustomDomain:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      CertificateArn: !Ref AcmCertificateArn
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      SecurityPolicy: TLS_1_2

  BasePathMapping:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomain
      Stage: !Ref StageName

Outputs:
  RestApiId:
    Description: ID of the private REST API
    Value: !Ref RestApi
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
  DomainName:
    Description: Custom domain name
    Value: !Ref CustomDomainName
  InvokeUrl:
    Description: Invoke URL via custom domain
    Value: !Sub 'https://${CustomDomainName}/${StageName}/'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with DataDog for centralized log forwarding, automating delivery of application logs from source MyDataDogApp to DataDog API'

Parameters:
  DataDogApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: testanu
    Description: 'DataDog API key for log authentication'

Resources:
  DataDogDLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for DataDog DLQ encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/EventBridgeConnectionRole'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'

  DataDogDLQKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/DataDogDLQKey
      TargetKeyId: !Ref DataDogDLQKey

  DataDogDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: DataDogDeadLetterQueue
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref DataDogDLQKeyAlias
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
    DependsOn: DataDogDLQKey

  EventBridgeConnectionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeConnectionRole
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/*/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DLQAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDeadLetterQueue.Arn

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: DD-API-KEY
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref DataDogApiKey

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogApiDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 100

  DataDogEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: DataDogLogForwarding

  DataDogLogForwardingRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      State: ENABLED
      Description: 'Captures events from MyDataDogApp source and forwards to DataDog'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyDataDogApp
      Targets:
        - Id: DataDogTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeConnectionRole.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DataDogDeadLetterQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom DataDog EventBus'
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBusArn'
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Connection to DataDog'
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ConnectionArn'
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DataDog API Destination'
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiDestinationArn'
  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the dead-letter SQS queue for failed deliveries'
    Value: !Ref DataDogDeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeadLetterQueueUrl'
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule forwarding logs to DataDog'
    Value: !Ref DataDogLogForwardingRule
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RuleArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  CloudFormation template that provisions an S3 bucket and an SQS queue, configuring the bucket to send notifications to the queue for all s3:ObjectCreated:* events.

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  Fn::Sub:
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${lowstack}-notification-bucket'
                    - lowstack:
                        Fn::Lower:
                          Fn::Sub: '${AWS::StackName}'

  SQSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'

  ObjectCreatedQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '${lowstack}-object-created-queue'
          - lowstack:
              Fn::Lower:
                Fn::Sub: '${AWS::StackName}'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSEncryptionKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt ObjectCreatedQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  Fn::Sub:
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${lowstack}-notification-bucket'
                    - lowstack:
                        Fn::Lower:
                          Fn::Sub: '${AWS::StackName}'
      Queues:
        - !Ref ObjectCreatedQueue

  NotificationBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName:
        Fn::Sub:
          - '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${lowstack}-notification-bucket'
          - lowstack:
              Fn::Lower:
                Fn::Sub: '${AWS::StackName}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt ObjectCreatedQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  NotificationBucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 notification bucket
    Value: !Ref NotificationBucket
  ObjectCreatedQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS object created queue
    Value: !Ref ObjectCreatedQueue
  ObjectCreatedQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS object created queue
    Value: !GetAtt ObjectCreatedQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge rule forwarding demo.cli events to SNS'

Resources:
  DemoSNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for Demo SNS Topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'

  DemoEventSNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: 'Demo CLI Events Topic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref 'DemoSNSEncryptionKey'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'DemoCLIEventForwarding'
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

  DemoEventSNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy'
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref 'DemoEventSNSTopic'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sns:Publish'
            Resource: !Ref 'DemoEventSNSTopic'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/${DemoCLIRule}'

  DemoCLIRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      State: 'ENABLED'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - 'demo.cli'
      Targets:
        - Id: 'DemoSNSTarget'
          Arn: !Ref 'DemoEventSNSTopic'
          Input: '$'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Purpose'
          Value: 'DemoCLIEventForwarding'
        - Key: 'ManagedBy'
          Value: 'CloudFormation'

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Topic'
    Value: !Ref 'DemoEventSNSTopic'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNSTopicArn'

  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule'
    Value: !GetAtt 'DemoCLIRule.Arn'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleArn'

  EventBridgeRuleName:
    Description: 'Name of the EventBridge Rule'
    Value: !Ref 'DemoCLIRule'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeRuleName'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EDI X12_214 to JSON transformation pipeline using AWS B2BI'

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
  ProfileName:
    Type: String
  BusinessContactName:
    Type: String
  BusinessContactEmail:
    Type: String
  BusinessContactPhone:
    Type: String
  PipelineName:
    Type: String

Resources:
  B2BIKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for B2BI S3 encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: 's3.*.amazonaws.com'
          - Sid: Allow B2BI service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:CallerAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-b2bi-input-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref B2BIKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref InputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: B2BIGetInput
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${InputBucket}/input/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: EnforceKMS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${InputBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: aws:kms
    DependsOn:
      - InputBucket
      - B2BIKMSKey

  OutputBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-b2bi-output-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref B2BIKMSKey
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: TransitionToIA
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: 30
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  OutputBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OutputBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: B2BIPutOutput
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OutputBucket}/output/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: EnforceKMS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${OutputBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: aws:kms
    DependsOn:
      - OutputBucket
      - B2BIKMSKey

  ErrorBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}-b2bi-error-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref B2BIKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ErrorBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ErrorBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: B2BIWriteError
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: b2bi.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ErrorBucket}/error/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: EnforceKMS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject*
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ErrorBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: aws:kms
    DependsOn:
      - ErrorBucket
      - B2BIKMSKey

  Profile:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Profile
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ProfileName
      BusinessName: !Ref BusinessContactName
      Phone: !Ref BusinessContactPhone
      Email: !Ref BusinessContactEmail
      Logging: ENABLED
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Transformer:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Transformer
    Properties:
      Name: X12_214_to_JSON
      Status: active
      InputConversion:
        FromFormat: X12
      OutputConversion:
        ToFormat: X12
      Mapping:
        TemplateLanguage: JSONATA
        Template: |
          {
            "interchangeControlNumber": "${ISA.ISA13}",
            "shipmentIdentification": "${B2.B202}",
            "shipmentStatusCode": "${L11.L1101}",
            "date": "${L11.L1102}",
            "shipperName": "${N1[N101='SF'].N103}",
            "carrierName": "${N1[N101='CA'].N103}"
          }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Partnership:
    Type: AWS::B2BI::Partnership
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref PipelineName
      ProfileId: !Ref Profile
      Email: !Ref BusinessContactEmail
      Capabilities: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: B2BI-EDI-Pipeline
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  ProfileId:
    Description: The ID of the B2BI Profile
    Value: !Ref Profile
  ProfileArn:
    Description: The ARN of the B2BI Profile
    Value: !GetAtt Profile.ProfileArn
  TransformerId:
    Description: The ID of the B2BI Transformer
    Value: !Ref Transformer
  PartnershipId:
    Description: The ID of the B2BI Partnership
    Value: !Ref Partnership
  InputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the input S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref InputBucket
  OutputBucketName:
    Description: Name of the output S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref OutputBucket
  ErrorBucketName:
    Description: Name of the error S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref ErrorBucket
  KMSKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key used for S3 encryption
    Value: !Ref B2BIKMSKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated monitoring for Secrets Manager critical events with email alerts via EventBridge and SNS'

Metadata:
  'AWS::CloudFormation::Interface':
    ParameterGroups:
      - Label:
          default: 'Stack Configuration'
        Parameters:
          - StackNamePrefix
          - EmailAddress
          - SecretsManagerEventNames
    ParameterLabels:
      StackNamePrefix:
        default: 'Prefix for resource names'
      EmailAddress:
        default: 'Email address for alerts'
      SecretsManagerEventNames:
        default: 'Comma-delimited list of critical Secrets Manager event names'

Parameters:
  StackNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'sm-mon'
    Description: 'Prefix for resource names'
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '30'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin@example.com'
    Description: 'Email for Secrets Manager alerts'
  SecretsManagerEventNames:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: CreateSecret,DeleteSecret,UpdateSecret,PutSecretValue,RotateSecret
    Description: 'Critical lifecycle events to monitor'

Resources:
  SecretsManagerAlertsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-KMS key for SNS encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sns.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${StackNamePrefix}-SecretsManagerAlertsTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-SecretsManagerAlertsKMS'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-SecretsManagerAlertsTopic'
      DisplayName: 'Secrets Manager Critical Events'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SecretsManagerAlerts
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerAlertsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/${StackNamePrefix}-SecretsManagerAPIRule'
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

  SecretsManagerAPIRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${StackNamePrefix}-SecretsManagerAPIRule'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - 'AWS API Call via CloudTrail'
        detail:
          eventName: !Ref SecretsManagerEventNames
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'userArn': '$.detail.userIdentity.arn'
              'eventName': '$.detail.eventName'
              'secretId': '$.detail.requestParameters.secretId'
            InputTemplate: '"Secrets Manager Alert: Event <eventName> performed by <userArn> on secret: <secretId>"'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring

  SecretsManagerSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      TopicArn: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: 'Subscribe additional endpoints here'
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerAlertsTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: 'Rule monitoring Secrets Manager APIs'
    Value: !GetAtt SecretsManagerAPIRule.Arn
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'Confirm email subscription manually post-deployment'
    Value: !Ref SecretsManagerSubscription

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS-to-SQS fanout with filtering for metric types (temperature, humidity) and DLQ integration for scalable, selective message processing.'

Resources:
  MetricsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} metrics fanout encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MetricsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MetricsTopic'
      DisplayName: Central Metrics Fanout Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsQueue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn": "${AllMetricsDlq.Arn}", "maxReceiveCount": 5 }'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TemperatureDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TemperatureSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn": "${TemperatureDlq.Arn}", "maxReceiveCount": 5 }'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  HumidityDlq:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumidityDlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  HumiditySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySqsQueue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsKmsKey
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn": "${HumidityDlq.Arn}", "maxReceiveCount": 5 }'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MetricsFanout
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt AllMetricsSqsQueue.Arn

  TemperatureSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Temperature

  HumiditySubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref MetricsTopic
      Protocol: sqs
      Endpoint: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
      FilterPolicy:
        MetricType:
          - Humidity

  AllMetricsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref AllMetricsSqsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt AllMetricsSqsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MetricsTopic

  TemperatureQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MetricsTopic

  HumidityQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref HumiditySqsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MetricsTopic

Outputs:
  MetricsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the central Metrics SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref MetricsTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MetricsTopicArn'

  AllMetricsSqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the All Metrics SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref AllMetricsSqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsSqsQueueUrl'

  AllMetricsSqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the All Metrics SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt AllMetricsSqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsSqsQueueArn'

  TemperatureSqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the Temperature SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueueUrl'

  TemperatureSqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Temperature SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt TemperatureSqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureSqsQueueArn'

  HumiditySqsQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the Humidity SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref HumiditySqsQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySqsQueueUrl'

  HumiditySqsQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the Humidity SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt HumiditySqsQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumiditySqsQueueArn'

  AllMetricsDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the All Metrics DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt AllMetricsDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AllMetricsDlqArn'

  TemperatureDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the Temperature DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt TemperatureDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TemperatureDlqArn'

  HumidityDlqArn:
    Description: ARN of the Humidity DLQ
    Value: !GetAtt HumidityDlq.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HumidityDlqArn'

  MetricsKmsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared Metrics KMS Key
    Value: !GetAtt MetricsKmsKey.Arn
    Export:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Event-driven integration between DynamoDB streams and EventBridge, routing INSERT and MODIFY events from OrdersTable to OrderEventsBus via Pipes.'

Parameters:
  BillingMode:
    Type: String
    Default: PAY_PER_REQUEST
    AllowedValues:
      - PROVISIONED
      - PAY_PER_REQUEST
    Description: Billing mode for the DynamoDB table.
  KmsKeyArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional ARN of a customer managed KMS key for DynamoDB SSE. Leave empty for AWS managed key.

Conditions:
  UseCustomKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyArn, '']]

Resources:
  OrdersTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: OrdersTable
      BillingMode: !Ref BillingMode
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          KeyType: HASH
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: !If [UseCustomKMS, !Ref KmsKeyArn, 'alias/aws/dynamodb']
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEventIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  OrderEventsBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: OrderEventsBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEventIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DynamoDBStreamPipeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: DynamoDBStreamPipeRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonDynamoDBReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PutEventsPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt OrderEventsBus.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: OrderEventIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  InsertEventsPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: InsertEventsPipe
      RoleArn: !GetAtt DynamoDBStreamPipeRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt OrderEventsBus.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          StartingPosition: LATEST
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: '{"eventName":["INSERT"]}'
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters: {}
      Tags:
        Project: OrderEventIntegration
        Environment: Production

  ModifyEventsPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: ModifyEventsPipe
      RoleArn: !GetAtt DynamoDBStreamPipeRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt OrderEventsBus.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        DynamoDBStreamParameters:
          StartingPosition: LATEST
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: '{"eventName":["MODIFY"]}'
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters: {}
      Tags:
        Project: OrderEventIntegration
        Environment: Production

Outputs:
  OrdersTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref OrdersTable
  OrdersTableStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table stream
    Value: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
  OrderEventsBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge event bus
    Value: !GetAtt OrderEventsBus.Arn
  InsertEventsPipeName:
    Description: Name of the INSERT events Pipe
    Value: !Ref InsertEventsPipe
  InsertEventsPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the INSERT events Pipe
    Value: !GetAtt InsertEventsPipe.Arn
  ModifyEventsPipeName:
    Description: Name of the MODIFY events Pipe
    Value: !Ref ModifyEventsPipe
  ModifyEventsPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the MODIFY events Pipe
    Value: !GetAtt ModifyEventsPipe.Arn
  DynamoDBStreamPipeRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role used by the Pipes
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBStreamPipeRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an EventBridge Pipes workflow to enrich SQS messages with external API data (Zip code lookup) and log results to CloudWatch Logs, automating data augmentation and monitoring.'

Resources:
  SQSDataEnrichmentKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SQS queue encryption in message enrichment pipeline'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  PipesExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgePipesExecutionRole'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SQSAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                Resource: !GetAtt DataEnrichmentSQSQueue.Arn
        - PolicyName: LogsAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:PutResourcePolicy
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt MessageEnrichmentLogGroup.Arn
                  - !Sub '${MessageEnrichmentLogGroup.Arn}:*'
        - PolicyName: ApiDestinationInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt ZipCodeLookupApiDestination.Arn
        - PolicyName: KMSPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                Resource: !GetAtt SQSDataEnrichmentKey.Arn

  DataEnrichmentSQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: DataEnrichmentSQSQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 60
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSDataEnrichmentKey

  MessageEnrichmentLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/pipes/message-enrichment-logs
      RetentionInDays: 30
      KmsKeyId: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/logs'

  PublicZipAPIConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicZipAPIConnection'
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: x-api-key
          ApiKeyValue: public

  ZipCodeLookupApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt PublicZipAPIConnection.Arn
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ZipCodeLookupApiDestination'
      HttpMethod: GET
      InvocationEndpoint: https://api.zippopotam.us/us/

  SQSEnrichmentToLogsPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSEnrichmentToLogsPipe'
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn
      Source: !GetAtt DataEnrichmentSQSQueue.Arn
      SourceParameters:
        FilterCriteria:
          Filters:
            - Pattern: '{"body": [{"zip": [{"exists": "true"}]}]}'
        SqsQueueParameters:
          BatchSize: 10
          MaximumBatchingWindowInSeconds: 1
      Enrichment: !GetAtt ZipCodeLookupApiDestination.Arn
      EnrichmentParameters:
        InputTemplate: '{"zip": <$.body.zip>}'
        HttpParameters:
          QueryStringParameters:
            zip: '$[0].body.zip'
      Target: !GetAtt MessageEnrichmentLogGroup.Arn
      TargetParameters:
        InputTemplate: '{"originalMessage": $.body, "enrichedData": $.EnrichmentHttpResponse.body, "timestamp": $.$}'
      LogConfiguration:
        Level: INFO
        CloudwatchLogsLogDestination:
          LogGroupArn: !GetAtt MessageEnrichmentLogGroup.Arn
      Tags:
        Project: MessageEnrichment
        Environment: Production

Outputs:
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue serving as the source for the Pipes workflow
    Value: !Ref DataEnrichmentSQSQueue
  PipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe workflow
    Value: !GetAtt SQSEnrichmentToLogsPipe.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the API Destination used for enrichment
    Value: !GetAtt ZipCodeLookupApiDestination.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group used as target and for Pipe logging
    Value: !Ref MessageEnrichmentLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template that creates an EventBridge-to-Kinesis integration for real-time event streaming, routing application-generated events from source "my-application" to a Kinesis data stream for scalable processing or analytics.'

Parameters:
  Prefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyApp
    Description: Common prefix for resource names
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: Environment tag for resources

Resources:
  EventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${Prefix}-EventBus'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${Prefix}-EventsStream'
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 24
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  IAMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${Prefix}-EventBridgeKinesisRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/${Prefix}-EventBus/${Prefix}-EventsRule'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisPutPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                Resource: !Sub '${KinesisStream.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  EventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref EventBus
      Name: !Sub '${Prefix}-EventsRule'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - my-application
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: KinesisTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt IAMRole.Arn
          KinesisParameters:
            PartitionKeyPath: $.id
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              partitionKey: $.id
              data: '$'
            InputTemplate: '{"Data":<data>, "PartitionKey":<partitionKey>}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus
    Value: !GetAtt EventBus.Arn
  KinesisStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref KinesisStream
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule
    Value: !GetAtt EventRule.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an EventBridge integration with Shopify product creation API to automate product updates based on application events from source MyShopifyApp.'

Parameters:
  ShopifyShopName:
    Type: String
    Default: testanu
    Description: 'MyShopify domain prefix (e.g., testanu for testanu.myshopify.com)'
  ShopifyAdminApiKey:
    Type: String
    Default: 'placeholder-api-key'
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'Shopify Admin API access token'
  ShopifyApiVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: '2023-10'
    Description: 'Shopify Admin API version'

Resources:
  ShopifyEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration

  ShopifyConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: X-Shopify-Access-Token
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ShopifyAdminApiKey
      Description: 'EventBridge Connection to Shopify Admin API using API key'

  ShopifyProductCreationDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyProductCreationDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt ShopifyConnection.Arn
      Description: 'API Destination targeting Shopify product creation endpoint'
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationEndpoint: !Sub 'https://${ShopifyShopName}.myshopify.com/admin/api/${ShopifyApiVersion}/products.json'
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10

  ShopifyEventRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration

  ShopifyProductEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref ShopifyEventBus
      Description: 'EventBridge Rule to route events from source MyShopifyApp to Shopify product creation API Destination'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyShopifyApp
      Targets:
        - Id: ShopifyProductCreationTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt ShopifyProductCreationDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt ShopifyEventRuleRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'detail': '$.detail'
            InputTemplate: '{"product": <detail>}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the custom ShopifyEventBus'
    Value: !Ref ShopifyEventBus
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Connection for Shopify authentication'
    Value: !GetAtt ShopifyConnection.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the API Destination for Shopify product creation'
    Value: !GetAtt ShopifyProductCreationDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge Rule routing MyShopifyApp events'
    Value: !GetAtt ShopifyProductEventsRule.Arn
