final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with Stripe product API to automate product creation based on PartnerApp events.'
Metadata:
  Version: '1.0'
Parameters:
  StripeApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: 'Bearer sk_test_00000000000000'
    Description: 'The Stripe secret key prefixed with "Bearer " (e.g., "Bearer sk_live_..."). Default is a test key; override with real key in production/CI.'
    AllowedPattern: '^Bearer\s+sk_.*'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be prefixed with "Bearer " followed by a Stripe secret key starting with "sk_"'
Resources:
  PartnerAppEventBus:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::EventBus'
    Properties:
      Name: PartnerAppEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: PartnerAppEventBus
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: StripeEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'
  StripeConnection:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Connection'
    Properties:
      Name: 'StripeConnection'
      AuthorizationType: 'API_KEY'
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: 'Authorization'
          ApiKeyValue: !Sub '${StripeApiKey}'
  StripeProductsApiDestination:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::ApiDestination'
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt StripeConnection.Arn
      HttpMethod: 'POST'
      InvocationEndpoint: 'https://api.stripe.com/v1/products'
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10
      Name: StripeProductsApiDestination
  PartnerAppProductCreationRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      Description: 'Route PartnerAppDetailType events from PartnerAppEventBus to Stripe Products API for automated product creation'
      EventBusName: !Ref PartnerAppEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - PartnerApp
        'detail-type':
          - PartnerAppDetailType
      State: 'ENABLED'
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt StripeProductsApiDestination.Arn
          Id: 'StripeApiTarget'
          InputPath: '$.detail'
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Project'
          Value: StripeEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'
Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the PartnerAppEventBus'
    Value: !GetAtt PartnerAppEventBus.Arn
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the StripeConnection for API key authentication'
    Value: !GetAtt StripeConnection.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the StripeProductsApiDestination'
    Value: !GetAtt StripeProductsApiDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure API Gateway + DynamoDB for Music Data Management'

Parameters:
  TableNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: Music
    Description: Prefix for the DynamoDB table name

Resources:
  MusicTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${TableNamePrefix}'
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: artist
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: Artist-Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: artist
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
        RecoveryPeriodInDays: 35
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: MusicApiGatewayRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                Resource: !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn
                  - !Sub '${MusicTable.Arn}/index/Artist-Index'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  MusicApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MusicAPI
      Description: Secure Music CRUD API
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  MusicResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MusicApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: music

  ArtistResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !Ref MusicResource
      PathPart: '{artist}'

  CreateMusicMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/PutItem'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub
            - |
              {
                "TableName": "${TableName}",
                "Item": {
                  "id": {"S": "$util.autoId()"},
                  "artist": {"S": "$input.json('$.artist')"},
                  "album": {"S": "$input.json('$.album')"}
                },
                "ReturnValues": "ALL_NEW"
              }
            - TableName: !Ref MusicTable

  GetMusicByArtistMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ArtistResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      RequestParameters:
        'method.request.path.artist': true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/Query'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub
            - |
              #set($artist = $input.params("artist"))
              {
                "TableName": "${TableName}",
                "IndexName": "Artist-Index",
                "KeyConditionExpression": "artist = :v1",
                "ExpressionAttributeValues": {
                  ":v1": {"S": "$util.urlDecode($artist)"}
                }
              }
            - TableName: !Ref MusicTable
        RequestParameters:
          'integration.request.querystring.artist': 'method.request.path.artist'

  MusicApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      Description: Initial deployment
    DependsOn:
      - CreateMusicMethod
      - GetMusicByArtistMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref MusicApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      MethodSettings:
        - DataTraceEnabled: true
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          HttpMethod: '*'
          ResourcePath: '/*'
          MetricsEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  MusicUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: MusicPlan
      Throttle:
        RateLimit: 100
        BurstLimit: 200
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: DAY
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          Stage: prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  MusicApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: MusicApiKey
      Enabled: true
      StageKeys:
        - RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          StageName: prod
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: MusicAPI
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  MusicUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      UsagePlanId: !Ref MusicUsagePlan
      KeyId: !Ref MusicApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: API Gateway endpoint URL
    Value: !Sub 'https://${MusicApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/music'
  ApiKeyId:
    Description: API Key ID
    Value: !Ref MusicApiKey
  TableName:
    Description: DynamoDB Table Name
    Value: !Ref MusicTable
  ArtistIndexName:
    Description: GSI Name
    Value: Artist-Index

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure REST API Gateway integrated with SES for sending templated emails with validation, rate limits, quotas, and API key authentication.'

Resources:
  ApiGatewayExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SESSendEmail
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ses:SendEmail
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiGatewayExecutionRole'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EmailSender

  ApiGatewayLogRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchLogs
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiGatewayLogRole'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EmailSender

  EmailSenderApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: EmailSenderApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  AccessLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/apigateway/${EmailSenderApi}/prod-access'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogGroup'
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EmailSender

  EmailRequestModel:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Model
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      Name: EmailRequestModel
      ContentType: 'application/json'
      Schema:
        type: object
        required:
          - to
          - from
          - subject
          - text
          - html
        properties:
          to:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
            minItems: 1
            maxItems: 50
          from:
            type: string
          subject:
            type: string
            maxLength: 998
          text:
            type: string
            maxLength: 4194304
          html:
            type: string
            maxLength: 4194304
          replyTo:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
            maxItems: 50
          cc:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
            maxItems: 50
          bcc:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
            maxItems: 50

  EmailPayloadValidator:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RequestValidator
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      Name: EmailPayloadValidator
      ValidateRequestBody: true
      ValidateRequestParameters: true
    DependsOn:
      - EmailRequestModel

  SendEmailResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt EmailSenderApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: send-email

  SendEmailPostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      ResourceId: !Ref SendEmailResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      RequestValidatorId: !Ref EmailPayloadValidator
      RequestModels:
        'application/json': EmailRequestModel
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:ses:action/SendEmail'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          'application/json': |
            #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
            Action=SendEmail&Source=$util.urlEncode($inputRoot.from)&
            #set($toIndex = 1)
            #foreach($to in $inputRoot.to)
            Destination.ToAddresses.member.$toIndex=$util.urlEncode($to)&
            #set($toIndex = $toIndex + 1)
            #end
            #if($inputRoot.cc)
            #set($ccIndex = 1)
            #foreach($cc in $inputRoot.cc)
            Destination.CcAddresses.member.$ccIndex=$util.urlEncode($cc)&
            #set($ccIndex = $ccIndex + 1)
            #end
            #end
            #if($inputRoot.bcc)
            #set($bccIndex = 1)
            #foreach($bcc in $inputRoot.bcc)
            Destination.BccAddresses.member.$bccIndex=$util.urlEncode($bcc)&
            #set($bccIndex = $bccIndex + 1)
            #end
            #end
            #if($inputRoot.replyTo)
            #set($rtIndex = 1)
            #foreach($rt in $inputRoot.replyTo)
            ReplyToAddresses.member.$rtIndex=$util.urlEncode($rt)&
            #set($rtIndex = $rtIndex + 1)
            #end
            #end
            Message.Subject.Data=$util.urlEncode($inputRoot.subject)&Message.Subject.Charset=UTF-8&
            Message.Body.Text.Data=$util.urlEncode($inputRoot.text)&Message.Body.Text.Charset=UTF-8&
            Message.Body.Html.Data=$util.urlEncode($inputRoot.html)&Message.Body.Html.Charset=UTF-8
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            SelectionPattern: '2\d{2}'
            ResponseTemplates:
              'application/json': |
                #set($inputBody = $input.body)
                #if($inputBody.contains("<MessageId>"))
                #set($msgStart = $inputBody.indexOf("<MessageId>") + 10)
                #set($msgEnd = $inputBody.indexOf("</MessageId>"))
                #set($messageId = $inputBody.substring($msgStart, $msgEnd))
                {"status": "success", "messageId": "$util.escapeJavaScript($messageId)"}
                #else
                {"status": "error", "message": "Failed to parse response"}
                #end
    DependsOn:
      - EmailRequestModel

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName} deployment'
    DependsOn:
      - SendEmailPostMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
      StageName: prod
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      TracingEnabled: true
      MethodSettings:
        - HttpMethod: "*"
          ResourcePath: "/*"
          LoggingLevel: ERROR
          DataTraceEnabled: true
      AccessLogSetting:
        DestinationArn: !GetAtt AccessLogGroup.Arn
        Format: |
          {
           "requestId":"$context.requestId",
           "ip": "$context.identity.sourceIp",
           "caller":"$context.identity.caller",
           "user":"$context.identity.user",
           "requestTime":"$context.requestTime",
           "httpMethod":"$context.httpMethod",
           "resourcePath":"$context.resourcePath",
           "status":"$context.status",
           "protocol":"$context.protocol",
           "responseLength":"$context.responseLength"
          }

  EmailApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: EmailApiKey
      Enabled: true
      StageKeys:
        - RestApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
          StageName: prod
    DependsOn:
      - ProdStage

  EmailUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: EmailUsagePlan
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref EmailSenderApi
          Stage: prod
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 1000
        RateLimit: 500
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: MONTHLY
        Offset: 0
    DependsOn:
      - ProdStage

  EmailUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref EmailApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref EmailUsagePlan

  EmailApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EmailApiKey'
      Description: 'API Key ID and Usage Plan ID for Email Sender API'
      SecretString: !Sub '{"apiKeyId": "${EmailApiKey}", "usagePlanId": "${EmailUsagePlan}"}'

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: 'Full HTTPS endpoint URL for sending emails'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${EmailSenderApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/send-email'

  ApiInvokeUrl:
    Description: 'Base API invoke URL'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${EmailSenderApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod'

  ApiKeyId:
    Description: 'API Key ID'
    Value: !Ref EmailApiKey

  ApiKeySecretArn:
    Description: 'Secrets Manager ARN containing the API Key ID and usage plan ID'
    Value: !Ref EmailApiKeySecret

  UsagePlanId:
    Description: 'Usage Plan ID'
    Value: !Ref EmailUsagePlan

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: REST API Gateway integrated with Kinesis Data Streams for HTTP data ingestion/retrieval

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyDataStream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
  RetentionPeriodHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
  ApiStageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref StreamName
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: KinesisApiGateway
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  ApiGatewayKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${KinesisApi}/*
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:DescribeStreamSummary
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                Resource: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn

  KinesisApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: KinesisDataApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes:
        - application/octet-stream

  StreamResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: '{streamname}'

  RecordResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamResource
      PathPart: records

  RecordBatchResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref RecordResource
      PathPart: batch

  ShardsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamResource
      PathPart: shards

  ShardResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardsResource
      PathPart: '{shardid}'

  IteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardResource
      PathPart: iterator

  DescriptionResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamResource
      PathPart: description

  PutRecordMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecord
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "Data": "$util.base64Encode($input.body)",
              "PartitionKey": "$input.params('PartitionKey') ?: 'default'",
              "ExplicitHashKey": "$input.params('ExplicitHashKey')",
              "SequenceNumber": "$input.params('SequenceNumber')",
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamname')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $input.json('$')
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  GetRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetRecords
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "ShardIterator": "$input.params('shardIterator')",
              "Limit": "$input.params('limit') ?: '10'"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #if($input.path('$.Records'))
                {
                  "Records": [
                  #foreach($record in $input.path('$.Records'))
                    #if($foreach.index > 0),#end
                    {
                      "SequenceNumber": "$record.SequenceNumber",
                      "ApproximateArrivalTimestamp": "$record.ApproximateArrivalTimestamp",
                      "Data": "$util.base64Decode($record.Data).toString('UTF-8')",
                      "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey"
                    }
                  #end
                  ],
                  "NextShardIterator": "$input.path('$.NextShardIterator')"
                }
                #else
                {}
                #end
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  PutRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordBatchResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecords
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
            {
              "Records": [
              #foreach($record in $inputRoot)
                #if($foreach.index > 0),#end
                {
                  "Data": "$util.base64Encode($util.urlDecode($record.Data))",
                  "PartitionKey": "$record.PartitionKey ?: $input.params('PartitionKey')",
                  "ExplicitHashKey": "$record.ExplicitHashKey",
                  "SequenceNumber": "$record.SequenceNumber"
                }
              #end
              ],
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamname')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $input.json('$')
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  GetShardIteratorMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref IteratorResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetShardIterator
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "ShardId": "$input.params('shardid')",
              "ShardIteratorType": "$input.params('shardIteratorType') ?: 'TRIM_HORIZON'",
              "StartingSequenceNumber": "$input.params('StartingSequenceNumber')",
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamname')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $input.json('$')
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  DescribeStreamMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref DescriptionResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/DescribeStream
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('streamname')",
              "Limit": "$input.params('limit') ?: '100'",
              "ExclusiveStartShardId": "$input.params('exclusiveStartShardId')"
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: $util.toJson($input.path('$.StreamDescription'))
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200

  RecordOptions:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "{}"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ""
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  RecordBatchOptions:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref RecordBatchResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "{}"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'POST,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ""
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  IteratorOptions:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref IteratorResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "{}"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ""
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  DescriptionOptions:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref DescriptionResource
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: "{}"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseParameters:
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: "'Content-Type,X-Amz-Date,Authorization,X-Api-Key,X-Amz-Security-Token'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: "'GET,OPTIONS'"
              method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: "'*'"
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ""
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  ApiGatewayDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn:
      - PutRecordMethod
      - GetRecordsMethod
      - PutRecordsMethod
      - GetShardIteratorMethod
      - DescribeStreamMethod
      - RecordOptions
      - RecordBatchOptions
      - IteratorOptions
      - DescriptionOptions
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      Description: Deployment for Kinesis API

  ApiGatewayStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiGatewayDeployment
      StageName: !Ref ApiStageName
      TracingEnabled: true
      MethodSettings:
        - ResourcePath: '/*/*'
          HttpMethod: '*'
          LoggingLevel: INFO
          DataTraceEnabled: true
          MetricsEnabled: true

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Invoke URL for the API Gateway stage
    Value: !Sub https://${KinesisApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${ApiStageName}/
  StreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role for API Gateway
    Value: !GetAtt ApiGatewayKinesisRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an Amazon EFS file system with basic configurations for a testing environment, establishing a shared storage solution in us-east-1a.

Resources:
  TestingVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingVPC
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingInternetGateway
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingVPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref TestingInternetGateway

  TestingSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingSubnet
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingRouteTable
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref TestingRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref TestingInternetGateway

  TestingSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref TestingSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref TestingRouteTable

  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount target allowing inbound NFS (TCP 2049) from anywhere for testing.
      VpcId: !Ref TestingVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt TestingVPC.CidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingEFSMountTargetSG
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingEFS:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: alias/aws/elasticfilesystem
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      BackupPolicy:
        Status: ENABLED
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestingEFS
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedStorage

  TestingMountTarget:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref TestingEFS
      SubnetId: !Ref TestingSubnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: ID of the Testing EFS File System
    Value: !Ref TestingEFS
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSFileSystemId'

  MountTargetIpAddress:
    Description: IP address of the EFS Mount Target in us-east-1a
    Value: !GetAtt TestingMountTarget.IpAddress
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MountTargetIpAddress'

  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the Testing VPC
    Value: !Ref TestingVPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and compliant AWS Config setup with customizable retention policies and delivery configurations. Automates resource configuration tracking and audit logging across an AWS account. Includes S3 bucket (new or existing), SNS topic, IAM roles, Config Recorder, Delivery Channel, Retention Configuration, dynamic Lambda-backed Custom Resource for retention, and optional Configuration Aggregator.

Parameters:
  ConfigBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of existing S3 bucket for Config snapshots. Leave empty to create new.
  RetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2557
    MinValue: 30
    MaxValue: 2557
    Description: Retention period in days for Config items and snapshots (default ~7 years).
  DeliveryFrequency:
    Type: String
    Default: Daily
    AllowedValues:
      - OneHour
      - Daily
    Description: Snapshot delivery frequency (OneHour -> OneHour, Daily -> TwentyFourHours).
  EnableAggregator:
    Type: Boolean
    Default: true
    Description: Enable AWS Config Configuration Aggregator for account-wide visibility.
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: ARN of IAM permission boundary to apply to service roles (optional).

Conditions:
  CreateNewBucket: !Not[!Equals[!Ref ConfigBucketName,'']]
  EnablePermissionBoundary: !Not[!Equals[!Ref PermissionBoundaryArn,'']]
  IsOneHour: !Equals[!Ref DeliveryFrequency,'OneHour']

Resources:
  ConfigBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Condition: CreateNewBucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Enforces strong IAM password policies with Lambda-based dynamic management across the AWS account.'

Parameters:
  MinimumPasswordLength:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    MinValue: 6
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: 'Minimum password length'
  RequireUppercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require uppercase letters'
  RequireLowercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require lowercase letters'
  RequireNumbers:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require numbers'
  RequireSymbols:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require symbols'
  MaxPasswordAge:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1095
    Description: 'Password expiration in days'
  PasswordReusePrevention:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 24
    Description: 'Number of previous passwords to block reuse'
  AllowUsersPasswordReset:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Allow users to change their own passwords'
  LambdaApplyPolicy:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Invoke Lambda to apply policy on stack creation/update'
  UsePermissionBoundary:
    Type: String
    Default: 'false'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Enable optional IAM permission boundary policy'

Conditions:
  LambdaApplyPolicyCondition: !Equals [!Ref LambdaApplyPolicy, 'true']
  UsePermissionBoundaryCondition: !Equals [!Ref UsePermissionBoundary, 'true']

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PasswordPolicyIAMAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy
                  - iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy
                Resource: '*'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [UsePermissionBoundaryCondition, !Ref IAMPermissionBoundary, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation-PasswordPolicyStack

  IAMPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Condition: UsePermissionBoundaryCondition
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: PasswordPolicyPermissionBoundary
      Description: 'Permission boundary enforcing MFA and least privilege for password policy manager'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyCreateAccessKeysWithoutMFA
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - iam:CreateAccessKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyAttachAdminPoliciesToUsers
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - iam:AttachUserPolicy
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                iam:PolicyArn:
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess'
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess'
                  - '*Administrator*'
                  - '*Admin*'

  PasswordPolicyManager:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import logging
          import os
          import boto3
          import urllib.request

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def send_response(event, context, response_status, response_data={}, physical_resource_id=None, reason=None):
              if physical_resource_id is None:
                  physical_resource_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', 'AccountPasswordPolicy')

              response_body = {
                  'Status': response_status,
                  'Reason': reason or ('See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream.' if response_status == 'FAILED' else None),
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': response_data
              }

              json_body = json.dumps(response_body)

              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_body))
              }

              req = urllib.request.Request(
                  event['ResponseURL'],
                  data=json_body.encode('utf-8'),
                  method='PUT',
                  headers=headers
              )

              with urllib.request.urlopen(req):
                  logger.info(f'Response sent: {response_status}')

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  request_type = event['RequestType']
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  physical_resource_id = event.get('PhysicalResourceId', 'AccountPasswordPolicy')

                  iam = boto3.client('iam')

                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      try:
                          iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                          logger.info('Account password policy deleted successfully')
                      except Exception as delete_error:
                          logger.warning(f'Failed to delete password policy (may not exist): {str(delete_error)}')
                      send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS')
                      return

                  # Create or Update
                  action = props.get('Action', 'apply')
                  if action != 'apply':
                      raise ValueError(f'Unsupported action: {action}')

                  policy = {
                      'MinimumPasswordLength': int(os.environ['MIN_LENGTH']),
                      'RequireUppercaseCharacters': os.environ['REQ_UPPER'].lower() == 'true',
                      'RequireLowercaseCharacters': os.environ['REQ_LOWER'].lower() == 'true',
                      'RequireNumbers': os.environ['REQ_NUMBERS'].lower() == 'true',
                      'RequireSymbols': os.environ['REQ_SYMBOLS'].lower() == 'true',
                      'MaxPasswordAge': int(os.environ['MAX_AGE']),
                      'PasswordReusePrevention': int(os.environ['REUSE_PREV']),
                      'AllowUsersToChangePassword': os.environ['ALLOW_RESET'].lower() == 'true'
                  }

                  iam.update_account_password_policy(**policy)
                  logger.info('Account password policy applied successfully')
                  send_response(event, context, 'SUCCESS', {'Applied': True}, physical_resource_id)

              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f'Error processing event: {str(e)}')
                  send_response(event, context, 'FAILED', {'Error': str(e)}, reason=str(e))
      Environment:
        Variables:
          MIN_LENGTH: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
          REQ_UPPER: !Ref RequireUppercaseCharacters
          REQ_LOWER: !Ref RequireLowercaseCharacters
          REQ_NUMBERS: !Ref RequireNumbers
          REQ_SYMBOLS: !Ref RequireSymbols
          MAX_AGE: !Ref MaxPasswordAge
          REUSE_PREV: !Ref PasswordReusePrevention
          ALLOW_RESET: !Ref AllowUsersPasswordReset
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation-PasswordPolicyStack

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Condition: LambdaApplyPolicyCondition
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref PasswordPolicyManager
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: cloudformation.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*'

  PasswordPolicyCustomResource:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Condition: LambdaApplyPolicyCondition
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
      Action: apply

Outputs:
  AccountPasswordPolicyId:
    Description: 'ID of the account password policy'
    Value: 'Managed dynamically by PasswordPolicyCustomResource'
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function for dynamic password policy management'
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
  PermissionBoundaryArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the permission boundary (if enabled)'
    Value: !If [UsePermissionBoundaryCondition, !Ref IAMPermissionBoundary, 'Not Enabled']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Centralized SNS Alerting System with Fallback

Parameters:
  PrimaryTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: CentralAlertingTopic
  PrimaryEmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  PrimaryHttpsEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5

Conditions:
  HasEmails: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref PrimaryEmailAddress
      - ''
  HasHttpsEndpoints: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref PrimaryHttpsEndpoint
      - ''
  HasFallbackEmail: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Ref FallbackEmail
      - ''

Resources:
  AlertingKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for centralized alerting SNS topics
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
            Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
            Sid: Allow use of the key
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrimaryAlertTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertingKmsKey
      TopicName: !Ref PrimaryTopicName
      DisplayName: Centralized Alerting
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrimaryTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromServices
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - monitoring.amazonaws.com
                - rds.amazonaws.com
                - s3.amazonaws.com
                - budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  FallbackAlertTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref AlertingKmsKey
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Fallback"
      DisplayName: Fallback Alerting
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FallbackTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromServices
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - monitoring.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  PrimaryEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasEmails
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref PrimaryEmailAddress
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic

  PrimaryHttpsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasHttpsEndpoints
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref PrimaryHttpsEndpoint
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
      DeliveryPolicy: '{"http":{"defaultHealthyRetryPolicy":{"numRetries":3,"numNoDataRetries":3,"numMaxDelayRetries":0,"numMinDelayRetries":0},"timeout":30}}'

  FallbackEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: HasFallbackEmail
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackAlertTopic

  FailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: !Sub "Failed notifications exceeding ${AlarmThreshold} on ${PrimaryAlertTopic}"
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt PrimaryAlertTopic.TopicName
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralizedAlerting
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  PrimaryTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref PrimaryAlertTopic
  FallbackTopicArn:
    Value: !Ref FallbackAlertTopic
  AlarmName:
    Value: !Ref FailedNotificationsAlarm

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS Batch environment for scalable data processing tasks with S3 integration

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: batch-data
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
  DockerImage:
    Type: String
    Default: amazonlinux:2
    Description: Docker image for the job definition
  MaxVCpus:
    Type: Number
    Default: 16
    Description: Maximum vCPUs for the compute environment
  InputS3Key:
    Type: String
    Default: input/sample.txt
    Description: S3 key for the input file

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-public-rt"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for AWS Batch compute instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-batch-sg"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  S3KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to use key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3KMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  EC2InstanceProfileRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceProfileRole

  JobExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonECSTaskExecutionRolePolicy
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: BatchDemo

  BatchComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      State: ENABLED
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        MinvCpus: 0
        MaxvCpus: !Ref MaxVCpus
        DesiredvCpus: 0
        InstanceTypes:
          - m5.large
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        BidPercentage: 100
        Tags:
          Environment: BatchDemo
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      Tags:
        Name: BatchComputeEnv
        Environment: BatchDemo

  BatchJobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      State: ENABLED
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !GetAtt BatchComputeEnv.ComputeEnvironmentArn
      Tags:
        Environment: BatchDemo

  SampleS3JobDefinition:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      PlatformCapabilities:
        - EC2
      JobDefinitionName: SampleS3JobDefinition
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Ref DockerImage
        Vcpus: 2
        Memory: 4096
        ExecutionRoleArn: !GetAtt JobExecutionRole.Arn
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - !Sub |
              yum update -y && \
              yum install -y awscli && \
              aws s3 cp s3://${S3Bucket}/${InputS3Key} /tmp/output.txt && \
              aws s3 cp /tmp/output.txt s3://${S3Bucket}/output/processed.txt && \
              echo "Job completed"
        Environment:
          - Name: AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
            Value: !Ref AWS::Region
        MountPoints: []
        ReadonlyRootFilesystem: false
        Privileged: false
        Ulimits: []
      Tags:
        Environment: BatchDemo

Outputs:
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Compute Environment
    Value: !Ref BatchComputeEnv
  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Queue
    Value: !Ref BatchJobQueue
  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Definition
    Value: !Ref SampleS3JobDefinition
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a self-contained Apache/PHP web server stack in a new VPC with public subnet, EC2 t2.micro instance, security group allowing HTTP/SSH, IAM role for S3 access, and UserData script to install software and deploy ZIP content from S3.'

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: S3 bucket containing the ZIP file
  S3Key:
    Type: String
    Description: S3 key path to the ZIP file
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access (optional)
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for VPC
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)/(?:[0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2])$'
    ConstraintDescription: must be a valid CIDR range.
  MyIP:
    Type: String
    Description: 'CIDR for SSH access (e.g., 203.0.113.0/32 or your IP/32)'

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair:
    Fn::Not:
      - Fn::Equals:
          - !Ref KeyName
          - ''

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0bdb828fd58c522ec
    us-west-2:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic Lambda function with Node.js inline code and CloudWatch Logs permissions.'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
              return event.value || { statusCode: 200, body: 'Hello from Lambda!' };
          };
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  BasicLambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the basic Lambda function'
    Value: !Sub '${BasicLambdaFunction.Arn}'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BasicLambdaFunctionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with a mock /hello GET endpoint returning static "hello world" JSON, HTTPS enforced, caching disabled'

Resources:
  HelloWorldApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: HelloWorldApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  HelloResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt HelloWorldApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: hello

  HelloMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      ResourceId: !Ref HelloResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: '{}'
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{"message": "hello world"}'

  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
    DependsOn: HelloMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref HelloWorldApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref Deployment
      StageName: prod

  HelloApiWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: HelloApiWebACL
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: false
        MetricName: HelloApiWebACL
        SampledRequestsEnabled: false
      Rules: []

  Distribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Comment: CloudFront for Hello API Gateway
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        Enabled: true
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        WebACLId: !Ref HelloApiWebACL
        Restrictions:
          GeoRestriction:
            RestrictionType: none
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ApiGatewayOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PUT
            - POST
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
          CachePolicyId: "4135ea2d-6df8-44a3-9df3-4b5a84be39ad"
        Origins:
          - Id: ApiGatewayOrigin
            DomainName: !Sub '${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
            OriginPath: /prod
            CustomOriginConfig:
              HTTPSPort: 443
              HTTPPort: 80
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
              OriginSSLProtocols:
                - TLSv1.2

Outputs:
  DistributionId:
    Description: ID of the CloudFront Distribution
    Value: !Ref Distribution
  DistributionDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the CloudFront Distribution
    Value: !GetAtt Distribution.DomainName
  ApiGatewayInvokeUrl:
    Description: Direct invoke URL for the API Gateway /hello endpoint
    Value: !Sub 'https://${HelloWorldApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/hello'
  CloudFrontTestUrl:
    Description: Test URL for /hello via CloudFront
    Value: !Sub 'https://${Distribution.DomainName}/hello'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Developer IAM Governance Role with Configurable Boundaries and Enforcement'

Parameters:
  EnableStrictBoundaries:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['Yes', 'No']
    Default: 'No'
    Description: 'Toggle strict permission boundary enforcement. Yes enables restricted mode with conditions; No allows full IAM access.'
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'MyTeam'
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '20'
    Description: 'Prefix for team-specific IAM roles and policies (e.g., MyTeamRole).'
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: 'DevTeam'
    MinLength: '1'
    Description: 'Value for the mandatory Owner tag on developer-managed IAM resources.'

Conditions:
  StrictModeEnabled: !Equals [!Ref EnableStrictBoundaries, 'Yes']

Resources:
  DefaultPermissionBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DefaultBoundary'
      Description: 'Default permission boundary restricting to S3 full access and read-only IAM operations.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:Get*'
              - 'iam:List*'
              - 'iam:Generate*'
              - 'iam:Simulate*'
            Resource: '*'

  DeveloperIAMPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeveloperPolicy'
      Description: 'Policy for developers with togglable strict governance enforcement.'
      PolicyDocument:
        Fn::If:
          - StrictModeEnabled
          -
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              # Read-only IAM on all resources
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:Get*'
                  - 'iam:List*'
                  - 'iam:Generate*'
                  - 'iam:Simulate*'
                Resource: '*'
              # Full IAM control on team-prefixed roles, policies, and policy versions
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'iam:*'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policyversion/${TeamPrefix}*'
              # CreateRole with mandatory permission boundary and Owner tag
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'iam:CreateRole'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:PermissionsBoundary': !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary
                    'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
              # CreatePolicy with mandatory Owner tag
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'iam:CreatePolicy'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'iam:RequestTag/Owner': !Ref OwnerTagValue
              # Role tagging and PassRole (explicit for clarity, though covered by iam:*)
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:TagRole'
                  - 'iam:UntagRole'
                  - 'iam:ListRoleTags'
                  - 'iam:PassRole'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*'
              # Policy tagging (explicit for clarity)
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:TagPolicy'
                  - 'iam:UntagPolicy'
                  - 'iam:ListPolicyTags'
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*'
          -
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 'iam:*'
                Resource: '*'

  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeveloperRole'
      Path: '/'
      Description: 'Role for developers to manage IAM resources with governance controls.'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': true
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - !Ref DeveloperIAMPolicy
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue

Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DeveloperRole for secure assumption with MFA.'
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeveloperRoleArn'
  BoundaryArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the default permission boundary policy to reference when creating roles.'
    Value: !Ref DefaultPermissionBoundary
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BoundaryArn'
  DeveloperIAMPolicyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DeveloperIAMPolicy attached to the role.'
    Value: !Ref DeveloperIAMPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeveloperIAMPolicyArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless Pet Inventory GraphQL API with Lambda backend providing mock pet data.'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  PetDataLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return [
              {id: "1", name: "Fluffy", type: "Cat"},
              {id: "2", name: "Buddy", type: "Dog"},
              {id: "3", name: "Whiskers", type: "Cat"},
              {id: "4", name: "Max", type: "Dog"}
            ];
          };
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128

  AppSyncLambdaServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: appsync.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokePetLambdaPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt PetDataLambda.Arn

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi
    Properties:
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY
      Name: PetShopAPI

  PetSchema:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: ID!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }
        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet!]!
        }

  PetLambdaDataSource:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::DataSource
    DependsOn: PetSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Name: PetLambdaDataSource
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetDataLambda.Arn

  GetPetsResolver:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::Resolver
    DependsOn: PetSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      DataSourceName: !Ref PetLambdaDataSource
      FieldName: getPets
      TypeName: Query
      RequestMappingTemplate: |
        #set($input = {})
        {
          "version": "2018-05-29",
          "operation": "Invoke",
          "payload": $util.toJson($input)
        }
      ResponseMappingTemplate: "$util.toJson($context.result)"

  PetShopApiKey:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::ApiKey
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Expires: 365

Outputs:
  PetShopGraphQLURL:
    Description: GraphQL API endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.GraphQLUrl
  PetShopApiKey:
    Description: AppSync API Key for authentication
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopApiKey.ApiKey
  PetDataLambdaArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt PetDataLambda.Arn
